1: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // MODULE: Stage2 Fusion
3: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
4: // the rollout: 4-Stage Retrieval Pipeline
5: //
6: // I/O CONTRACT:
7: // Input:  Stage2Input { candidates: PipelineRow[], config, stage1Metadata }
8: // Output: Stage2Output { scored: PipelineRow[], metadata }
9: // Key invariants:
10: //     - Every score modification in the pipeline happens exactly once here
11: //     - Intent weights are NEVER applied to hybrid results (G2 double-weighting guard)
12: //     - scored is sorted descending by effective composite score on exit
13: // Side effects:
14: //     - FSRS write-back to memory_index (when trackAccess=true) — DB write
15: //     - Learned trigger and negative-feedback reads from DB
16: //
17: // PURPOSE: Single point for ALL scoring signals. Intent weights are
18: // Applied ONCE here only — this is the architectural guard against
19: // The G2 double-weighting recurrence bug.
20: //
21: // SIGNAL APPLICATION ORDER (must not be reordered — 13 steps):
22: // 1.  Session boost           — working-memory attention amplification
23: // 1a. Recency fusion          — time-decay bonus for recent memories
24: // 2.  Causal boost            — graph-traversal neighbor amplification
25: // 2a. Co-activation spreading — spreading activation from top-N seeds
26: // 2b. Community co-retrieval  — N2c inject community co-members
27: // 2c. Graph signals           — N2a momentum + N2b causal depth
28: // 3.  Testing effect          — FSRS strengthening write-back (trackAccess)
29: // 4.  Intent weights          — non-hybrid search post-scoring adjustment
30: // 5.  Artifact routing        — class-based weight boosts
31: // 6.  Feedback signals        — learned trigger boosts + negative demotions
32: // 6a. Retrieval rescue        — default-on trigger/sibling/backfill rescue layer
33: // 7.  Artifact limiting       — result count cap from routing strategy
34: // 8.  Anchor metadata         — extract named ANCHOR sections (annotation)
35: // 9.  Validation metadata     — spec quality signals enrichment + quality scoring
36: //
37: // Hybrid search already applies intent-aware scoring
38: // Internally (RRF / RSF fusion). Post-search intent weighting is
39: // Therefore ONLY applied for non-hybrid search types (vector,
40: // Multi-concept). Applying it to hybrid results would double-count.
41: //
42: // SCORE AUDIT CONTRACT: Stage 2 writes the fused `score` field (steps 1-7).
43: // Stage 3 (rerank) MAY overwrite `score` with the reranked value and MUST
44: // preserve the original in `stage2Score` for auditability (see F2.02 fix).
45: // Stage 4 (filter) MUST NOT mutate any score fields — it is read-only.
46: 
47: import type Database from 'better-sqlite3';
48: import path from 'path';
49: import { readFile } from 'fs/promises';
50: 
51: import { resolveEffectiveScore } from './types.js';
52: import type { Stage2Input, Stage2Output, PipelineRow, IntentWeightsConfig, ArtifactRoutingConfig } from './types.js';
53: 
54: import * as sessionBoost from '../session-boost.js';
55: import * as causalBoost from '../causal-boost.js';
56: import {
57:   isEnabled as isCoActivationEnabled,
58:   spreadActivation,
59:   getRelatedMemoryCounts,
60:   resolveCoActivationBoostFactor,
61: } from '../../cognitive/co-activation.js';
62: import type { SpreadResult } from '../../cognitive/co-activation.js';
63: import { ensureAdaptiveTables, getAdaptiveMode } from '../../cognitive/adaptive-ranking.js';
64: import * as fsrsScheduler from '../../cognitive/fsrs-scheduler.js';
65: import { queryLearnedTriggers } from '../learned-feedback.js';
66: import { applyNegativeFeedback, getNegativeFeedbackStats } from '../../scoring/negative-feedback.js';
67: import {
68:   isNegativeFeedbackEnabled,
69:   isCommunityDetectionEnabled,
70:   isGraphCalibrationProfileEnabled,
71:   isGraphSignalsEnabled,
72:   isUsageRankingEnabled,
73:   resolveGraphWalkRolloutState,
74:   isLearnedStage2CombinerEnabled,
75:   isResultProvenanceEnabled,
76: } from '../search-flags.js';
77: import { applyGraphContributionCalibration } from '../graph-calibration.js';
78: import { shadowScore, extractFeatureVector, loadModel } from '@spec-kit/shared/ranking/learned-combiner';
79: import type { LearnedModel } from '@spec-kit/shared/ranking/learned-combiner';
80: import { getAdaptiveWeights, isAdaptiveFusionEnabled } from '@spec-kit/shared/algorithms/adaptive-fusion';
81: import { addTraceEntry } from '@spec-kit/shared/contracts/retrieval-trace';
82: import { requireDb } from '../../../utils/db-helpers.js';
83: import { computeRecencyScore } from '../../scoring/folder-scoring.js';
84: import { enrichResultsWithAnchorMetadata } from '../anchor-metadata.js';
85: import { enrichResultsWithValidationMetadata } from '../validation-metadata.js';
86: // Stage 2b enrichment extracted for decomposition clarity
87: import { executeStage2bEnrichment } from './stage2b-enrichment.js';
88: import { applyCommunityBoost } from '../../graph/community-detection.js';
89: import { applyGraphSignals } from '../../graph/graph-signals.js';
90: import { computeUsageBoost } from '../../graph/usage-ranking-signal.js';
91: import { ensureUsageColumn } from '../../graph/usage-tracking.js';
92: import { isGraphUnifiedEnabled } from '../graph-flags.js';
93: import { resolveFusionIntentContract } from '../search-utils.js';
94: import { sortDeterministicRows } from './ranking-contract.js';
95: import { applyRetrievalRescueLayer, isRetrievalRescueEnabled } from '../rerank/retrieval-rescue.js';
96: import { createLogger } from '../../utils/logger.js';
97: 
98: // Feature catalog: 4-stage pipeline architecture
99: // Feature catalog: MPAB chunk-to-memory aggregation
100: 
101: 
102: // -- Internal type aliases --
103: 
104: /** A row with a resolved numeric base score for internal use. */
105: interface ScoredRow extends PipelineRow {
106:   intentAdjustedScore?: number;
107: }
108: 
109: /** Result of the strengthenOnAccess FSRS write-back. */
110: interface StrengthenResult {
111:   stability: number;
112:   difficulty: number;
113: }
114: 
115: interface ValidationMetadataLike {
116:   qualityScore?: number;
117:   specLevel?: number;
118:   completionStatus?: 'complete' | 'partial' | 'unknown';
119:   hasChecklist?: boolean;
120: }
121: 
122: // -- Constants --
123: 
124: /** Number of top results used as seeds for co-activation spreading. */
125: const SPREAD_ACTIVATION_TOP_N = 5;
126: const DEFAULT_LEARNED_STAGE2_MODEL_RELATIVE_PATH = path.join('models', 'learned-stage2-combiner.json');
127: const logger = createLogger('stage2-fusion');
128: 
129: /** Recency fusion weight — controls how much recency score contributes to the fused score.
130:  *  Env-tunable via SPECKIT_RECENCY_FUSION_WEIGHT (default 0.07). */
131: const RECENCY_FUSION_WEIGHT = parseFloat(process.env.SPECKIT_RECENCY_FUSION_WEIGHT || '') || 0.07;
132: 
133: /** Recency fusion cap — maximum bonus a candidate can receive from recency fusion.
134:  *  Env-tunable via SPECKIT_RECENCY_FUSION_CAP (default 0.10). */
135: const RECENCY_FUSION_CAP = parseFloat(process.env.SPECKIT_RECENCY_FUSION_CAP || '') || 0.10;
136: 
137: const MIN_VALIDATION_MULTIPLIER = 0.8;
138: const MAX_VALIDATION_MULTIPLIER = 1.2;
139: 
140: type LearnedStage2ModelCacheEntry = {
141:   path: string;
142:   model: LearnedModel | null;
143: };
144: 
145: let cachedLearnedStage2Model: LearnedStage2ModelCacheEntry | null = null;
146: let learnedStage2ModelLoadPromise: Promise<LearnedStage2ModelCacheEntry> | null = null;
147: let learnedStage2ModelLoadPromisePath: string | null = null;
148: 
149: function clampMultiplier(value: number): number {
150:   if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return 1;
151:   if (value < MIN_VALIDATION_MULTIPLIER) return MIN_VALIDATION_MULTIPLIER;
152:   if (value > MAX_VALIDATION_MULTIPLIER) return MAX_VALIDATION_MULTIPLIER;
153:   return value;
154: }
155: 
156: function isShadowLearningModelLoadEnabled(): boolean {
157:   return process.env.SPECKIT_SHADOW_LEARNING?.toLowerCase().trim() === 'true';
158: }
159: 
160: // Learned blend weight. Reads SPECKIT_LEARNED_STAGE2_BLEND_WEIGHT
161: // (default 0.0 → identical to today's shadow-only behavior). Clamped to
162: // [0, 0.05] so promotion stays a small guarded blend, never a flip. The
163: // bound is intentional: even when opted in, the manual combiner remains the
164: // dominant signal (>=95%) and the learned model acts as a tiebreaker, not a
165: // steering wheel. NaN, negative, and out-of-range values clamp to the bound.
166: const MAX_LEARNED_BLEND_WEIGHT = 0.05;
167: let warnedLearnedBlendClamp = false;
168: 
169: function resolveLearnedBlendWeight(env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv = process.env): number {
170:   const raw = env.SPECKIT_LEARNED_STAGE2_BLEND_WEIGHT;
171:   if (raw === undefined || raw === '') return 0;
172:   const parsed = Number.parseFloat(raw);
173:   if (!Number.isFinite(parsed)) return 0;
174:   if (parsed <= 0) return 0;
175:   if (parsed > MAX_LEARNED_BLEND_WEIGHT) {
176:     if (!warnedLearnedBlendClamp) {
177:       warnedLearnedBlendClamp = true;
178:       console.warn(
179:         `[stage2-fusion] SPECKIT_LEARNED_STAGE2_BLEND_WEIGHT=${raw} exceeds the ${MAX_LEARNED_BLEND_WEIGHT} guard; clamping. Promotion is a small guarded blend, not a flip.`
180:       );
181:     }
182:     return MAX_LEARNED_BLEND_WEIGHT;
183:   }
184:   return parsed;
185: }
186: 
187: function resolveLearnedStage2ModelPath(): string {
188:   const configured = process.env.SPECKIT_LEARNED_STAGE2_MODEL?.trim();
189:   if (!configured) {
190:     return path.resolve(process.cwd(), DEFAULT_LEARNED_STAGE2_MODEL_RELATIVE_PATH);
191:   }
192:   if (path.isAbsolute(configured)) {
193:     return configured;
194:   }
195:   return path.resolve(process.cwd(), configured);
196: }
197: 
198: async function loadPersistedLearnedStage2Model(): Promise<LearnedModel | null> {
199:   if (!isShadowLearningModelLoadEnabled()) {
200:     return null;
201:   }
202: 
203:   const modelPath = resolveLearnedStage2ModelPath();
204:   if (cachedLearnedStage2Model?.path === modelPath) {
205:     return cachedLearnedStage2Model.model;
206:   }
207: 
208:   if (learnedStage2ModelLoadPromise && learnedStage2ModelLoadPromisePath === modelPath) {
209:     return (await learnedStage2ModelLoadPromise).model;
210:   }
211: 
212:   if (learnedStage2ModelLoadPromisePath !== modelPath) {
213:     learnedStage2ModelLoadPromise = null;
214:     learnedStage2ModelLoadPromisePath = null;
215:   }
216: 
217:   learnedStage2ModelLoadPromisePath = modelPath;
218:   learnedStage2ModelLoadPromise = (async (): Promise<LearnedStage2ModelCacheEntry> => {
219:     try {
220:       const json = await readFile(modelPath, 'utf8');
221:       const model = loadModel(json);
222:       if (!model) {
223:         console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] learned stage2 model at ${modelPath} is invalid; shadow scoring will use manual-only fallback`);
224:       }
225:       const entry = { path: modelPath, model };
226:       cachedLearnedStage2Model = entry;
227:       return entry;
228:     } catch (err: unknown) {
229:       const entry = { path: modelPath, model: null };
230:       cachedLearnedStage2Model = entry;
231: 
232:       const code = typeof err === 'object' && err !== null && 'code' in err
233:         ? String((err as { code?: unknown }).code)
234:         : '';
235:       if (code !== 'ENOENT') {
236:         const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
237:         console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] learned stage2 model load failed: ${message}`);
238:       }
239:       return entry;
240:     } finally {
241:       learnedStage2ModelLoadPromise = null;
242:       learnedStage2ModelLoadPromisePath = null;
243:     }
244:   })();
245: 
246:   return (await learnedStage2ModelLoadPromise).model;
247: }
248: 
249: /**
250:  * Apply validation-signal scoring at the Stage 2 single scoring point.
251:  *
252:  * Uses quality metadata extracted from spec artifacts to apply a bounded
253:  * multiplier over the current composite score. This keeps integrated
254:  * in ranking while preserving score stability.
255:  */
256: function applyValidationSignalScoring(results: PipelineRow[]): PipelineRow[] {
257:   if (!Array.isArray(results) || results.length === 0) return results;
258: 
259:   const adjusted = results.map((row) => {
260:     const metadata = row.validationMetadata as ValidationMetadataLike | undefined;
261:     if (!metadata || typeof metadata !== 'object') return row;
262: 
263:     const baseScore = resolveBaseScore(row);
264:     const quality = typeof metadata.qualityScore === 'number' && Number.isFinite(metadata.qualityScore)
265:       ? Math.max(0, Math.min(1, metadata.qualityScore))
266:       : 0.5;
267: 
268:     const qualityFactor = 0.9 + (quality * 0.2); // [0.9, 1.1]
269:     const specLevelBonus = typeof metadata.specLevel === 'number' && Number.isFinite(metadata.specLevel)
270:       ? Math.max(0, Math.min(0.06, (metadata.specLevel - 1) * 0.02))
271:       : 0;
272: 
273:     const completionBonus = metadata.completionStatus === 'complete'
274:       ? 0.04
275:       : metadata.completionStatus === 'partial'
276:         ? 0.015
277:         : 0;
278: 
279:     const checklistBonus = metadata.hasChecklist ? 0.01 : 0;
280:     const multiplier = clampMultiplier(qualityFactor + specLevelBonus + completionBonus + checklistBonus);
281:     const scored = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, baseScore * multiplier));
282: 
283:     if (scored === baseScore) return row;
284:     return withSyncedScoreAliases(row, scored);
285:   });
286: 
287:   return sortDeterministicRows(adjusted as Array<PipelineRow & { id: number }>);
288: }
289: 
290: // -- Internal helpers --
291: 
292: /**
293:  * Replaced with shared resolveEffectiveScore()
294:  * from types.ts. The shared function uses the correct fallback chain:
295:  * intentAdjustedScore → rrfScore → score → similarity/100, all clamped to [0,1].
296:  * This alias ensures all call sites use the shared implementation.
297:  */
298: const resolveBaseScore = resolveEffectiveScore;
299: 
300: function withSyncedScoreAliases(row: PipelineRow, score: number): PipelineRow {
301:   // F2.03 fix: Clamp to [0,1] so downstream consumers never see raw boosted values > 1.
302:   const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, score));
303:   return {
304:     ...row,
305:     score: clamped,
306:     rrfScore: clamped,
307:     intentAdjustedScore: clamped,
308:     // Preserve attentionScore — it is set by the attention-decay module and
309:     // must not be overwritten with the fusion/ranking score.
310:   };
311: }
312: 
313: function syncScoreAliasesInPlace(rows: PipelineRow[]): void {
314:   for (const row of rows) {
315:     if (typeof row.score !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(row.score)) continue;
316:     // F2.03 fix: Clamp to [0,1] during in-place sync.
317:     const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, row.score));
318:     row.score = clamped;
319:     row.rrfScore = clamped;
320:     row.intentAdjustedScore = clamped;
321:     // Preserve attentionScore — it is set by the attention-decay module and
322:     // must not be overwritten with the fusion/ranking score.
323:   }
324: }
325: 
326: type GraphContributionKey = 'causalDelta' | 'coActivationDelta' | 'communityDelta' | 'graphSignalDelta';
327: 
328: function withGraphContribution(
329:   row: PipelineRow,
330:   key: GraphContributionKey,
331:   delta: number,
332:   source: string,
333:   injected: boolean = false,
334: ): PipelineRow {
335:   const current = (row.graphContribution && typeof row.graphContribution === 'object')
336:     ? row.graphContribution as Record<string, unknown>
337:     : {};
338:   const sources = Array.isArray(current.sources)
339:     ? current.sources.filter((value): value is string => typeof value === 'string')
340:     : [];
341:   const nextSources = sources.includes(source) ? sources : [...sources, source];
342:   const currentValue = typeof current[key] === 'number' && Number.isFinite(current[key]) ? current[key] : 0;
343:   const totalDelta = ['causalDelta', 'coActivationDelta', 'communityDelta', 'graphSignalDelta']
344:     .reduce((sum, field) => {
345:       const existing = field === key ? currentValue + delta : current[field];
346:       return sum + (typeof existing === 'number' && Number.isFinite(existing) ? existing : 0);
347:     }, 0);
348:   return {
349:     ...row,
350:     graphContribution: {
351:       ...current,
352:       [key]: currentValue + delta,
353:       totalDelta,
354:       sources: nextSources,
355:       injected: current.injected === true || injected,
356:     },
357:   };
358: }
359: 
360: function countGraphContribution(rows: PipelineRow[], key: GraphContributionKey): number {
361:   return rows.filter((row) => {
362:     const graphContribution = row.graphContribution as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
363:     return typeof graphContribution?.[key] === 'number' && Math.abs(graphContribution[key] as number) > 0;
364:   }).length;
365: }
366: 
367: function countGraphInjected(rows: PipelineRow[]): number {
368:   return rows.filter((row) => {
369:     const graphContribution = row.graphContribution as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
370:     return graphContribution?.injected === true;
371:   }).length;
372: }
373: 
374: function resolveGraphContributionValue(
375:   graphContribution: Record<string, unknown> | undefined,
376:   key: GraphContributionKey,
377: ): number {
378:   const value = graphContribution?.[key];
379:   return typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value) ? value : 0;
380: }
381: 
382: function resolveRowDocumentType(row: PipelineRow): string | undefined {
383:   const candidate = row.documentType ?? row.document_type;
384:   return typeof candidate === 'string' && candidate.length > 0 ? candidate : undefined;
385: }
386: 
387: function applyGraphCalibrationProfileToResults(results: PipelineRow[]): PipelineRow[] {
388:   return results.map((row) => {
389:     const graphContribution = row.graphContribution as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
390:     const originalSignals = {
391:       causalDelta: Math.max(0, resolveGraphContributionValue(graphContribution, 'causalDelta')),
392:       coActivationDelta: Math.max(0, resolveGraphContributionValue(graphContribution, 'coActivationDelta')),
393:       graphSignalDelta: Math.max(0, resolveGraphContributionValue(graphContribution, 'graphSignalDelta')),
394:       communityDelta: Math.max(0, resolveGraphContributionValue(graphContribution, 'communityDelta')),
395:     };
396:     const originalTotalDelta = Object.values(originalSignals).reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0);
397: 
398:     if (originalTotalDelta === 0) {
399:       return row;
400:     }
401: 
402:     const calibrated = applyGraphContributionCalibration(originalSignals);
403:     const calibratedTotalDelta =
404:       calibrated.causalDelta +
405:       calibrated.coActivationDelta +
406:       calibrated.communityDelta +
407:       calibrated.graphSignalDelta;
408: 
409:     const adjustedScore = resolveBaseScore(row)
410:       - originalTotalDelta
411:       + calibratedTotalDelta;
412: 
413:     const calibratedRow = withSyncedScoreAliases(row, adjustedScore);
414: 
415:     return {
416:       ...calibratedRow,
417:       graphContribution: {
418:         ...(graphContribution ?? {}),
419:         causalDelta: calibrated.causalDelta,
420:         coActivationDelta: calibrated.coActivationDelta,
421:         graphSignalDelta: calibrated.graphSignalDelta,
422:         communityDelta: calibrated.communityDelta,
423:         totalDelta: calibratedTotalDelta,
424:       },
425:     };
426:   });
427: }
428: 
429: /**
430:  * Populate graphEvidence provenance on each result that received
431:  * a graph-based boost. Extracts contributing causal edges, co-activation edges,
432:  * and community membership from the database. Gated behind SPECKIT_RESULT_PROVENANCE.
433:  *
434:  * Fail-open: returns results unchanged on any error.
435:  */
436: function populateGraphEvidence(results: PipelineRow[]): PipelineRow[] {
437:   if (!isResultProvenanceEnabled()) return results;
438:   if (!Array.isArray(results) || results.length === 0) return results;
439: 
440:   let db: Database.Database | null = null;
441:   try {
442:     db = requireDb();
443:   } catch (_err: unknown) {
444:     return results;
445:   }
446: 
447:   // Collect IDs of results that received any graph-based contribution
448:   const graphBoostedIds: number[] = [];
449:   for (const row of results) {
450:     const gc = row.graphContribution as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
451:     if (!gc) continue;
452:     const totalDelta = typeof gc.totalDelta === 'number' ? gc.totalDelta : 0;
453:     if (totalDelta > 0 || gc.injected === true) {
454:       graphBoostedIds.push(row.id);
455:     }
456:   }
457: 
458:   if (graphBoostedIds.length === 0) return results;
459: 
460:   // Batch-fetch contributing causal edges for all boosted IDs
461:   const edgeMap = new Map<number, Array<{ sourceId: number; targetId: number; relation: string; strength: number }>>();
462:   try {
463:     const placeholders = graphBoostedIds.map(() => '?').join(', ');
464:     const edgeRows = (db.prepare(`
465:       SELECT source_id, target_id, relation, COALESCE(strength, 1.0) AS strength
466:       FROM causal_edges
467:       WHERE source_id IN (${placeholders}) OR target_id IN (${placeholders})
468:     `) as Database.Statement).all(
469:       ...graphBoostedIds.map(String),
470:       ...graphBoostedIds.map(String),
471:     ) as Array<{ source_id: number; target_id: number; relation: string; strength: number }>;
472: 
473:     for (const edge of edgeRows) {
474:       const sourceId = typeof edge.source_id === 'number' ? edge.source_id : Number(edge.source_id);
475:       const targetId = typeof edge.target_id === 'number' ? edge.target_id : Number(edge.target_id);
476:       if (!Number.isFinite(sourceId) || !Number.isFinite(targetId)) continue;
477: 
478:       const entry = {
479:         sourceId,
480:         targetId,
481:         relation: typeof edge.relation === 'string' ? edge.relation : 'unknown',
482:         strength: typeof edge.strength === 'number' && Number.isFinite(edge.strength) ? edge.strength : 1.0,
483:       };
484: 
485:       // Associate edge with both source and target if they are in the boosted set
486:       const boostedIdSet = new Set(graphBoostedIds);
487:       for (const id of [sourceId, targetId]) {
488:         if (boostedIdSet.has(id)) {
489:           const existing = edgeMap.get(id) ?? [];
490:           existing.push(entry);
491:           edgeMap.set(id, existing);
492:         }
493:       }
494:     }
495:   } catch (err: unknown) {
496:     const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
497:     console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] provenance edge fetch failed: ${message}`);
498:   }
499: 
500:   // Batch-fetch community memberships for boosted IDs
501:   const communityMap = new Map<number, Array<{ communityId: number; summary?: string }>>();
502:   try {
503:     const placeholders = graphBoostedIds.map(() => '?').join(', ');
504:     const communityRows = (db.prepare(`
505:       SELECT cm.memory_id, cm.community_id, c.summary
506:       FROM community_members cm
507:       LEFT JOIN communities c ON c.id = cm.community_id
508:       WHERE cm.memory_id IN (${placeholders})
509:     `) as Database.Statement).all(
510:       ...graphBoostedIds.map(String),
511:     ) as Array<{ memory_id: number; community_id: number; summary?: string }>;
512: 
513:     for (const row of communityRows) {
514:       const memoryId = typeof row.memory_id === 'number' ? row.memory_id : Number(row.memory_id);
515:       if (!Number.isFinite(memoryId)) continue;
516:       const existing = communityMap.get(memoryId) ?? [];
517:       existing.push({
518:         communityId: typeof row.community_id === 'number' ? row.community_id : Number(row.community_id),
519:         summary: typeof row.summary === 'string' ? row.summary : undefined,
520:       });
521:       communityMap.set(memoryId, existing);
522:     }
523:   } catch (err: unknown) {
524:     // Community tables may not exist — fail-open
525:     const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
526:     console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] provenance community fetch failed (non-fatal): ${message}`);
527:   }
528: 
529:   // Attach graphEvidence to each boosted result
530:   return results.map((row) => {
531:     const gc = row.graphContribution as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
532:     if (!gc) return row;
533:     const totalDelta = typeof gc.totalDelta === 'number' ? gc.totalDelta : 0;
534:     if (totalDelta <= 0 && gc.injected !== true) return row;
535: 
536:     const edges = edgeMap.get(row.id) ?? [];
537:     const communities = communityMap.get(row.id) ?? [];
538: 
539:     // Build boost factors from the graph contribution deltas
540:     const boostFactors: Array<{ type: string; delta: number }> = [];
541:     const causalDelta = typeof gc.causalDelta === 'number' ? gc.causalDelta : 0;
542:     const coActivationDelta = typeof gc.coActivationDelta === 'number' ? gc.coActivationDelta : 0;
543:     const communityDelta = typeof gc.communityDelta === 'number' ? gc.communityDelta : 0;
544:     const graphSignalDelta = typeof gc.graphSignalDelta === 'number' ? gc.graphSignalDelta : 0;
545: 
546:     if (causalDelta !== 0) boostFactors.push({ type: 'causal', delta: causalDelta });
547:     if (coActivationDelta !== 0) boostFactors.push({ type: 'co-activation', delta: coActivationDelta });
548:     if (communityDelta !== 0) boostFactors.push({ type: 'community', delta: communityDelta });
549:     if (graphSignalDelta !== 0) boostFactors.push({ type: 'graph-signals', delta: graphSignalDelta });
550: 
551:     return {
552:       ...row,
553:       graphEvidence: {
554:         edges,
555:         communities,
556:         boostFactors,
557:       },
558:     };
559:   });
560: }
561: 
562: /**
563:  * Write an FSRS strengthening update for a single memory access.
564:  *
565:  * Mirrors the `strengthenOnAccess` logic from the legacy memory-search
566:  * handler. Uses GRADE_GOOD with a difficulty bonus inversely proportional
567:  * to current retrievability, so low-retrievability memories receive the
568:  * largest stability boost.
569:  *
570:  * @param db             - Active SQLite connection
571:  * @param memoryId       - ID of the memory being strengthened
572:  * @param retrievability - Current retrievability R(t) in [0, 1]
573:  */
574: function strengthenOnAccess(
575:   db: Database.Database,
576:   memoryId: number,
577:   retrievability: number
578: ): StrengthenResult | null {
579:   if (typeof memoryId !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(memoryId)) return null;
580: 
581:   const clampedR = (typeof retrievability === 'number' && retrievability >= 0 && retrievability <= 1)
582:     ? retrievability
583:     : 0.9;
584: 
585:   try {
586:     const memory = db.prepare(
587:       'SELECT stability, difficulty, review_count FROM memory_index WHERE id = ?'
588:     ).get(memoryId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
589: 
590:     if (!memory) return null;
591: 
592:     const grade = fsrsScheduler.GRADE_GOOD;
593:     const difficultyBonus = Math.max(0, (0.9 - clampedR) * 0.5);
594: 
595:     const newStability = fsrsScheduler.updateStability(
596:       (memory.stability as number) || fsrsScheduler.DEFAULT_INITIAL_STABILITY,
597:       (memory.difficulty as number) || fsrsScheduler.DEFAULT_INITIAL_DIFFICULTY,
598:       grade,
599:       clampedR
600:     ) * (1 + difficultyBonus);
601: 
602:     db.prepare(`
603:       UPDATE memory_index
604:       SET stability = ?,
605:           last_review = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
606:           review_count = review_count + 1,
607:           access_count = access_count + 1,
608:           last_accessed = ?
609:       WHERE id = ?
610:     `).run(newStability, Date.now(), memoryId);
611: 
612:     return { stability: newStability, difficulty: (memory.difficulty as number) || fsrsScheduler.DEFAULT_INITIAL_DIFFICULTY };
613:   } catch (err: unknown) {
614:     const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
615:     console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] strengthenOnAccess failed for id ${memoryId}: ${message}`);
616:     return null;
617:   }
618: }
619: 
620: // -- Exported internal functions (also exposed via __testables) --
621: 
622: /**
623:  * Apply intent-based weights to search results.
624:  *
625:  * G2 PREVENTION: This function is ONLY called for non-hybrid search types.
626:  * Hybrid search (RRF / RSF) already incorporates intent-weighted signals
627:  * during fusion. Calling this on hybrid results would double-count intent.
628:  *
629:  * Weight combination:
630:  *   intentScore = similarity * w.similarity + importance * w.importance + recency * w.recency
631:  *
632:  * Similarity is normalised from the raw 0–100 scale to 0–1 before the
633:  * weighted combination so all three dimensions operate on the same scale.
634:  * Results are sorted descending by intentAdjustedScore.
635:  *
636:  * @param results - Pipeline rows to score
637:  * @param weights - Intent weight configuration {similarity, importance, recency}
638:  * @returns New array sorted by intentAdjustedScore descending
639:  */
640: function applyIntentWeightsToResults(
641:   results: PipelineRow[],
642:   weights: IntentWeightsConfig
643: ): PipelineRow[] {
644:   if (!Array.isArray(results) || results.length === 0) return results;
645:   if (!weights) return results;
646: 
647:   const scored: ScoredRow[] = results.map((row) => {
648:     // Normalise similarity from 0–100 to 0–1 for proper weight combination
649:     const similarityRaw = typeof row.similarity === 'number' && Number.isFinite(row.similarity)
650:       ? row.similarity
651:       : resolveBaseScore(row) * 100; // fall back to base score rescaled
652: 
653:     const similarity = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, similarityRaw / 100));
654:     const importance = typeof row.importance_weight === 'number' && Number.isFinite(row.importance_weight)
655:       ? row.importance_weight
656:       : 0.5;
657: 
658:     // Recency: use created_at as the timestamp (ISO string stored in DB)
659:     const recencyTimestamp = (row.created_at as string | undefined) ?? '';
660:     const importanceTier = (row.importance_tier as string | undefined) ?? 'normal';
661:     const recency = computeRecencyScore(recencyTimestamp, importanceTier);
662: 
663:     const intentScore =
664:       similarity * weights.similarity +
665:       importance * weights.importance +
666:       recency * weights.recency;
667: 
668:     return {
669:       ...row,
670:       intentAdjustedScore: intentScore,
671:     };
672:   });
673: 
674:   return scored.sort((a, b) => {
675:     const aScore = typeof a.intentAdjustedScore === 'number' ? a.intentAdjustedScore : 0;
676:     const bScore = typeof b.intentAdjustedScore === 'number' ? b.intentAdjustedScore : 0;
677:     if (bScore === aScore) return (a.id ?? 0) - (b.id ?? 0);
678:     return bScore - aScore;
679:   });
680: }
681: 
682: /**
683:  * Apply artifact routing weight boosts to results.
684:  *
685:  * When the routing system detected a known artifact class with non-zero
686:  * confidence, the class strategy's `boostFactor` is applied to the
687:  * current composite score (`score`, then `rrfScore`, then `similarity`).
688:  * Results are re-sorted by score descending after boosting.
689:  *
690:  * @param results       - Pipeline rows to boost
691:  * @param routingResult - Artifact routing configuration from Stage 1
692:  * @returns New array with updated scores, sorted descending
693:  */
694: function applyArtifactRouting(
695:   results: PipelineRow[],
696:   routingResult: ArtifactRoutingConfig
697: ): PipelineRow[] {
698:   if (!Array.isArray(results) || results.length === 0) return results;
699:   if (!routingResult || routingResult.confidence <= 0) return results;
700: 
701:   // Obtain boostFactor from the strategy object (passed through config)
702:   const strategy = routingResult.strategy as { boostFactor?: number; maxResults?: number };
703:   const boostFactor = typeof strategy?.boostFactor === 'number'
704:     ? Math.max(0, Math.min(2, strategy.boostFactor))
705:     : 1.0;
706: 
707:   if (boostFactor === 1.0) {
708:     // No boost; still re-sort for consistency
709:     return sortDeterministicRows(results as Array<PipelineRow & { id: number }>);
710:   }
711: 
712:   const boosted = results.map((row) => {
713:     const baseScore = resolveBaseScore(row);
714:     const boostedScore = baseScore * boostFactor;
715:     return {
716:       ...withSyncedScoreAliases(row, boostedScore),
717:       artifactBoostApplied: boostFactor,
718:     };
719:   });
720: 
721:   return sortDeterministicRows(boosted as Array<PipelineRow & { id: number }>);
722: }
723: 
724: /**
725:  * Apply feedback signals — learned trigger boosts and negative feedback demotions.
726:  *
727:  * Learned triggers: each memory that matches the query's learned terms receives
728:  * a proportional boost to its score (capped at 1.0). The boost magnitude uses
729:  * `match.weight` directly because queryLearnedTriggers already applies the
730:  * configured learned-trigger weighting (0.7x).
731:  *
732:  * Negative feedback: memories with wasUseful=false validations receive a
733:  * confidence-multiplier demotion. The multiplier is batch-loaded from the DB
734:  * then applied via applyNegativeFeedback. Feature-gated via
735:  * SPECKIT_NEGATIVE_FEEDBACK env var.
736:  *
737:  * @param results - Pipeline rows to adjust
738:  * @param query   - Original search query (used for learned trigger matching)
739:  * @returns New array with feedback-adjusted scores
740:  */
741: function applyFeedbackSignals(
742:   results: PipelineRow[],
743:   query: string
744: ): PipelineRow[] {
745:   if (!Array.isArray(results) || results.length === 0) return results;
746: 
747:   let db: Database.Database | null = null;
748:   try {
749:     db = requireDb();
750:   } catch (error: unknown) {
751:     if (error instanceof Error) {
752:       // DB not available — skip feedback signals gracefully
753:       return results;
754:     }
755:     // DB not available — skip feedback signals gracefully
756:     return results;
757:   }
758: 
759:   // -- Learned trigger boosts --
760:   let learnedBoostMap = new Map<number, number>();
761:   try {
762:     const learnedMatches = queryLearnedTriggers(query, db as Parameters<typeof queryLearnedTriggers>[1]);
763:     for (const match of learnedMatches) {
764:       const boost = match.weight;
765:       const existing = learnedBoostMap.get(match.memoryId) ?? 0;
766:       learnedBoostMap.set(match.memoryId, Math.max(existing, boost));
767:     }
768:   } catch (err: unknown) {
769:     const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
770:     console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] learned trigger query failed: ${message}`);
771:     learnedBoostMap = new Map();
772:   }
773: 
774:   // -- Negative feedback stats (batch load) --
775:   let negativeFeedbackStats = new Map<number, { negativeCount: number; lastNegativeAt: number | null }>();
776:   if (isNegativeFeedbackEnabled()) {
777:     try {
778:       const memoryIds = results.map((r) => r.id);
779:       negativeFeedbackStats = getNegativeFeedbackStats(db as Parameters<typeof getNegativeFeedbackStats>[0], memoryIds);
780:     } catch (err: unknown) {
781:       const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
782:       console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] negative feedback stats failed: ${message}`);
783:     }
784:   }
785: 
786:   // -- Apply combined adjustments --
787:   return results.map((row) => {
788:     let currentScore = resolveBaseScore(row);
789: 
790:     // Apply learned trigger boost (additive to base score, capped at 1.0)
791:     const learnedBoost = learnedBoostMap.get(row.id) ?? 0;
792:     if (learnedBoost > 0) {
793:       currentScore = Math.min(1.0, currentScore + learnedBoost);
794:     }
795: 
796:     // Apply negative feedback demotion (multiplicative confidence multiplier)
797:     if (isNegativeFeedbackEnabled()) {
798:       const negStats = negativeFeedbackStats.get(row.id);
799:       if (negStats && negStats.negativeCount > 0) {
800:         currentScore = applyNegativeFeedback(
801:           currentScore,
802:           negStats.negativeCount,
803:           negStats.lastNegativeAt
804:         );
805:       }
806:     }
807: 
808:     if (currentScore === resolveBaseScore(row)) return row;
809: 
810:     return withSyncedScoreAliases(row, currentScore);
811:   });
812: }
813: 
814: function applyUsageRankingBoost(
815:   db: Database.Database,
816:   results: PipelineRow[],
817: ): PipelineRow[] {
818:   if (!isUsageRankingEnabled() || !Array.isArray(results) || results.length === 0) {
819:     return results;
820:   }
821: 
822:   try {
823:     ensureUsageColumn(db);
824:     const resultIds = results
825:       .map((row) => row.id)
826:       .filter((id): id is number => typeof id === 'number' && Number.isFinite(id));
827: 
828:     if (resultIds.length === 0) {
829:       return results;
830:     }
831: 
832:     const placeholders = resultIds.map(() => '?').join(',');
833:     const usageRows = db.prepare(`
834:       SELECT id, COALESCE(access_count, 0) AS access_count
835:       FROM memory_index
836:       WHERE id IN (${placeholders})
837:     `).all(...resultIds) as Array<{ id: number; access_count: number }>;
838: 
839:     if (usageRows.length === 0) {
840:       return results;
841:     }
842: 
843:     const maxAccess = usageRows.reduce((currentMax, row) =>
844:       Math.max(currentMax, Number.isFinite(row.access_count) ? row.access_count : 0), 0);
845: 
846:     if (maxAccess <= 0) {
847:       return results;
848:     }
849: 
850:     const usageMap = new Map(usageRows.map((row) => [row.id, row.access_count]));
851:     const boosted = results.map((row) => {
852:       const accessCount = usageMap.get(row.id) ?? 0;
853:       const usageBoost = computeUsageBoost(accessCount, maxAccess);
854: 
855:       if (usageBoost <= 0) {
856:         return row;
857:       }
858: 
859:       return {
860:         ...withSyncedScoreAliases(row, resolveBaseScore(row) + usageBoost),
861:         usageBoost,
862:       };
863:     });
864: 
865:     return sortDeterministicRows(boosted as Array<PipelineRow & { id: number }>);
866:   } catch (err: unknown) {
867:     const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
868:     console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] usage ranking failed: ${message}`);
869:     return results;
870:   }
871: }
872: 
873: /**
874:  * Apply FSRS testing effect (strengthening write-back) for all accessed memories.
875:  *
876:  * Called only when `trackAccess` is true (explicit opt-in to avoid
877:  * unintended write side-effects during read-only searches).
878:  *
879:  * For each result, the current retrievability R(t) is computed from the stored
880:  * stability and last_review fields, then `strengthenOnAccess` fires an FSRS
881:  * GRADE_GOOD update — increasing stability proportional to how much the memory
882:  * needed the review.
883:  *
884:  * Errors per-row are caught and logged; they do not abort the full set.
885:  *
886:  * @param db      - Active SQLite database connection
887:  * @param results - Pipeline rows that were accessed
888:  */
889: function applyTestingEffect(
890:   db: Database.Database,
891:   results: PipelineRow[]
892: ): void {
893:   if (!db || !Array.isArray(results) || results.length === 0) return;
894: 
895:   for (const row of results) {
896:     try {
897:       const lastReview = (row.last_review as string | undefined | null) || (row.created_at as string | undefined);
898:       if (!lastReview) continue;
899: 
900:       const stability = typeof row.stability === 'number' && Number.isFinite(row.stability)
901:         ? row.stability
902:         : fsrsScheduler.DEFAULT_INITIAL_STABILITY;
903: 
904:       const elapsedDays = fsrsScheduler.calculateElapsedDays(lastReview);
905:       const currentR = fsrsScheduler.calculateRetrievability(
906:         stability,
907:         Math.max(0, elapsedDays)
908:       );
909: 
910:       strengthenOnAccess(db, row.id, currentR);
911:     } catch (err: unknown) {
912:       const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
913:       console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] applyTestingEffect failed for id ${row.id}: ${message}`);
914:     }
915:   }
916: }
917: 
918: function recordAdaptiveAccessSignals(
919:   db: Database.Database,
920:   results: PipelineRow[],
921:   query: string | undefined
922: ): void {
923:   if (!db || !Array.isArray(results) || results.length === 0) return;
924: 
925:   if (getAdaptiveMode() === 'disabled') return;
926: 
927:   ensureAdaptiveTables(db);
928:   const insertAdaptiveSignal = db.prepare(`
929:     INSERT INTO adaptive_signal_events (memory_id, signal_type, signal_value, query, actor, metadata)
930:     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
931:   `);
932:   const writeAdaptiveSignals = db.transaction((accessedResults: PipelineRow[]) => {
933:     for (const result of accessedResults) {
934:       insertAdaptiveSignal.run(
935:         result.id,
936:         'access',
937:         1.0,
938:         query || '',
939:         '',
940:         '{}',
941:       );
942:     }
943:   });
944: 
945:   try {
946:     writeAdaptiveSignals(results);
947:   } catch (err: unknown) {
948:     // Adaptive signal capture must never block the core search pipeline.
949:     console.warn('[stage2-fusion] adaptive access signal write failed:', (err as Error)?.message ?? err);
950:   }
951: }
952: 
953: // -- Main Stage 2 entry point --
954: 
955: /**
956:  * Execute Stage 2: Fusion + Signal Integration.
957:  *
958:  * This is the SINGLE authoritative point where all scoring signals are
959:  * applied. The ordering is fixed and must not be changed without updating
960:  * the architectural documentation (see types.ts Stage2 comment block).
961:  *
962:  * Signal application order (13 steps):
963:  *   1.  Session boost      (hybrid only — working memory attention)
964:  *   1a. Recency fusion     (all types — time-decay bonus)
965:  *   2.  Causal boost       (hybrid only — graph-traversal amplification)
966:  *   2a. Co-activation      (spreading activation from top-N seeds)
967:  *   2b. Community boost    (N2c — inject co-members)
968:  *   2c. Graph signals      (N2a+N2b — momentum + depth)
969:  *   3.  Testing effect     (all types, when trackAccess = true)
970:  *   4.  Intent weights     (non-hybrid only — G2 prevention)
971:  *   5.  Artifact routing   (all types, when routing confidence > 0)
972:  *   6.  Feedback signals   (all types — learned triggers + negative feedback)
973:  *   7.  Artifact limiting  (trim to strategy.maxResults if routing active)
974:  *   8.  Anchor metadata    (annotation — no score mutation)
975:  *   9.  Validation metadata (spec quality signals + quality scoring)
976:  *
977:  * @param input - Stage 2 input containing candidates and pipeline config
978:  * @returns Stage 2 output with scored results and per-signal metadata
979:  */
980: export async function executeStage2(input: Stage2Input): Promise<Stage2Output> {
981:   const { candidates, config } = input;
982:   const start = Date.now();
983: 
984:   const metadata: Stage2Output['metadata'] & { communityBoostApplied?: boolean; graphSignalsApplied?: boolean } = {
985:     sessionBoostApplied: 'off',
986:     causalBoostApplied: 'off',
987:     intentWeightsApplied: 'off',
988:     artifactRoutingApplied: 'off',
989:     feedbackSignalsApplied: 'off',
990:     graphContribution: {
991:       killSwitchActive: !isGraphUnifiedEnabled(),
992:       causalBoosted: 0,
993:       coActivationBoosted: 0,
994:       communityInjected: 0,
995:       graphSignalsBoosted: 0,
996:       totalGraphInjected: 0,
997:       rolloutState: resolveGraphWalkRolloutState(),
998:     },
999:     qualityFiltered: 0,
1000:     durationMs: 0,
1001:   };
1002: 
1003:   // FIX #3: Deep clone candidates so in-place mutations (e.g., syncScoreAliasesInPlace)
1004:   // cannot corrupt the original Stage 1 output. A shallow copy ([...candidates]) shares
1005:   // the same row objects, creating a race condition if the orchestrator's timeout fallback
1006:   // uses the original Stage 1 candidates array.
1007:   let results: PipelineRow[] = candidates.map(row => ({ ...row }));
1008:   const isHybrid = config.searchType === 'hybrid';
1009: 
1010:   // -- 1. Session boost --
1011:   // Only for hybrid search type — session attention signals are most meaningful
1012:   // When the full hybrid result set is available for ordering.
1013:   if (isHybrid && config.enableSessionBoost && config.sessionId) {
1014:     try {
1015:       const { results: boosted, metadata: sbMeta } = sessionBoost.applySessionBoost(
1016:         results,
1017:         config.sessionId
1018:       );
1019:       results = boosted as PipelineRow[];
1020:       // FIX #4: Sync aliases immediately after session boost score mutations
1021:       // so rrfScore/intentAdjustedScore are not stale for subsequent steps.
1022:       syncScoreAliasesInPlace(results);
1023:       metadata.sessionBoostApplied = sbMeta.applied ? 'applied' : 'enabled';
1024:     } catch (err: unknown) {
1025:       const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
1026:       console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] session boost failed: ${message}`);
1027:       metadata.sessionBoostApplied = 'failed';
1028:     }
1029:   }
1030: 
1031:   // -- 1a. Recency fusion --
1032:   // Applies a time-decay bonus to each candidate based on its created_at timestamp.
1033:   // Uses computeRecencyScore (already imported but previously unused in hybrid path).
1034:   // Bonus is capped at RECENCY_FUSION_CAP and clamped to keep score in [0, 1].
1035:   try {
1036:     let recencyBoostedCount = 0;
1037:     const fusionIntent = resolveFusionIntentContract({
1038:       detectedIntent: config.detectedIntent,
1039:       adaptiveFusionIntent: config.adaptiveFusionIntent,
1040:       query: config.query,
1041:     });
1042:     const adaptiveRecencyEnabled = Boolean(fusionIntent) && isAdaptiveFusionEnabled();
1043:     results = results.map((row) => {
1044:       const recencyTimestamp = (row.created_at as string | undefined) ?? '';
1045:       const importanceTier = (row.importance_tier as string | undefined) ?? 'normal';
1046:       if (!recencyTimestamp) return row;
1047: 
1048:       const recencyScore = computeRecencyScore(recencyTimestamp, importanceTier);
1049:       const recencyWeight = adaptiveRecencyEnabled && fusionIntent
1050:         ? getAdaptiveWeights(fusionIntent, resolveRowDocumentType(row)).recencyWeight
1051:         : RECENCY_FUSION_WEIGHT;
1052:       const bonus = Math.min(RECENCY_FUSION_CAP, recencyScore * recencyWeight);
1053:       if (bonus <= 0) return row;
1054: 
1055:       const baseScore = resolveBaseScore(row);
1056:       const boostedScore = Math.min(1.0, baseScore + bonus);
1057:       if (boostedScore === baseScore) return row;
1058: 
1059:       recencyBoostedCount++;
1060:       return withSyncedScoreAliases(row, boostedScore);
1061:     });
1062:     if (recencyBoostedCount > 0) {
1063:       syncScoreAliasesInPlace(results);
1064:       (metadata as Record<string, unknown>).recencyFusionApplied = true;
1065:       (metadata as Record<string, unknown>).recencyFusionBoosted = recencyBoostedCount;
1066:     }
1067:   } catch (err: unknown) {
1068:     const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
1069:     console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] recency fusion failed: ${message}`);
1070:   }
1071: 
1072:   // -- 2. Causal boost --
1073:   // Only for hybrid search type — causal graph traversal is seeded from the
1074:   // Top results after session boost has re-ordered them.
1075:   if (isHybrid && config.enableCausalBoost && isGraphUnifiedEnabled()) {
1076:     try {
1077:       const beforeScores = new Map(results.map((row) => [row.id, resolveBaseScore(row)]));
1078:       const { results: boosted, metadata: cbMeta } = causalBoost.applyCausalBoost(results);
1079:       results = (boosted as PipelineRow[]).map((row) => {
1080:         const previous = beforeScores.get(row.id) ?? resolveBaseScore(row);
1081:         const next = resolveBaseScore(row);
1082:         return next !== previous
1083:           ? withGraphContribution(row, 'causalDelta', next - previous, 'causal', row.injectedByCausalBoost === true)
1084:           : row;
1085:       });
1086:       // FIX #4: Sync aliases immediately after causal boost score mutations.
1087:       syncScoreAliasesInPlace(results);
1088:       metadata.causalBoostApplied = cbMeta.applied ? 'applied' : 'enabled';
1089:     } catch (err: unknown) {
1090:       const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
1091:       console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] causal boost failed: ${message}`);
1092:       metadata.causalBoostApplied = 'failed';
1093:     }
1094:   }
1095: 
1096:   // -- 2a. Co-activation spreading --
1097:   // Gated behind SPECKIT_COACTIVATION flag. Takes the top-N results as seeds,
1098:   // Performs spreading activation traversal, and boosts scores of results that
1099:   // Appear in the co-activation graph. Matches V1 hybrid-search behavior.
1100:   if (isCoActivationEnabled() && isGraphUnifiedEnabled()) {
1101:     try {
1102:       const topIds = results
1103:         .slice(0, SPREAD_ACTIVATION_TOP_N)
1104:         .map(r => r.id)
1105:         .filter((id): id is number => typeof id === 'number');
1106: 
1107:       if (topIds.length > 0) {
1108:         const spreadResults: SpreadResult[] = spreadActivation(topIds);
1109:         if (spreadResults.length > 0) {
1110:           const spreadMap = new Map(spreadResults.map(sr => [sr.id, sr.activationScore]));
1111:           const relatedCounts = getRelatedMemoryCounts([...new Set(spreadResults.map((result) => result.id))]);
1112:           results = results.map((row) => {
1113:             const boost = spreadMap.get(row.id);
1114:             if (boost !== undefined) {
1115:               const baseScore = resolveBaseScore(row);
1116:               // fan-effect divisor: dampen hub nodes proportionally to their
1117:               // fan-out degree so no single hub dominates the top-N results.
1118:               // Uses the same sqrt scaling as co-activation.ts boostScore().
1119:               const relatedCount = typeof row.id === 'number' ? (relatedCounts.get(row.id) ?? 0) : 0;
1120:               const fanDivisor = Math.sqrt(Math.max(1, relatedCount));
1121:               const updated = withSyncedScoreAliases(row, baseScore + (boost * resolveCoActivationBoostFactor()) / fanDivisor);
1122:               return withGraphContribution(updated, 'coActivationDelta', resolveBaseScore(updated) - baseScore, 'co-activation');
1123:             }
1124:             return row;
1125:           });
1126:           // Re-sort after co-activation boost to ensure boosted results
1127:           // Are promoted to their correct position in the ranking
1128:           results = sortDeterministicRows(results as Array<PipelineRow & { id: number }>);
1129:           (metadata as Record<string, unknown>).coActivationApplied = true;
1130:         }
1131:       }
1132:     } catch (err: unknown) {
1133:       // Non-critical enrichment — co-activation failure does not affect core ranking
1134:       const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
1135:       console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] co-activation spreading failed: ${message}`);
1136:     }
1137:   }
1138: 
1139:   // -- 2b. Community co-retrieval (N2c) --
1140:   // Inject community co-members into result set before graph signals
1141:   // So injected rows also receive momentum/depth adjustments.
1142:   if (isCommunityDetectionEnabled() && isGraphUnifiedEnabled()) {
1143:     const beforeCommunityIds = new Set(results.map((row) => row.id));
1144:     try {
1145:       const db = requireDb();
1146:       const boosted = applyCommunityBoost(results, db);
1147:       if (boosted.length > results.length) {
1148:         results = (boosted as PipelineRow[]).map((row) => beforeCommunityIds.has(row.id)
1149:           ? row
1150:           : withGraphContribution(row, 'communityDelta', 0, 'community', true));
1151:         (metadata as Record<string, unknown>).communityBoostApplied = true;
1152:       }
1153:     } catch (err: unknown) {
1154:       const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
1155:       console.warn(`[stage2-fusion] community boost failed: ${message}`);
1156:     }
1157: 
1158:     const injectedIds = results
1159:       .filter((row) => !beforeCommunityIds.has(row.id) && typeof row.id === 'number')
1160:       .map((row) => row.id);
1161:     if (injectedIds.length > 0) {
1162:       try {
1163:         const db = requireDb();
1164:         const placeholders = injectedIds.map(() => '?').join(',');
1165:         const stateRows = db.prepare(
1166:           `SELECT id, memory_state FROM memory_index WHERE id IN (${placeholders})`
1167:         ).all(...injectedIds) as Array<{ id: number; memory_state?: string }>;
1168:         const stateMap = new Map(stateRows.map((row) => [row.id, row.memory_state]));
1169:         const injectedIdSet = new Set(injectedIds);
1170:         for (const row of results) {
1171:           const rowId = typeof row.id === 'number' ? row.id : null;
1172:           if (rowId === null || !injectedIdSet.has(rowId)) {
1173:             continue;
1174:           }
1175:           const hydratedState = stateMap.get(rowId);
1176:           if (typeof hydratedState === 'string') {
1177:             row.memoryState = hydratedState;
1178:           }
1179:         }
1180:       } catch (err: unknown) {
1181:         console.warn('[stage2] Community state hydration failed:', err instanceof Error ? err.message : err);
1182:       }
1183:     }
1184:   }
1185: 
1186:   // -- 2c. Graph signals (N2a + N2b) --
1187:   // Additive score adjustments for graph momentum and causal depth.
1188:   if (isGraphSignalsEnabled() && isGraphUnifiedEnabled()) {
1189:     try {
1190:       const db = requireDb();

1192:       const signaled = applyGraphSignals(results, db, {
1193:         rolloutState: resolveGraphWalkRolloutState(),
1194:       });
1195:       results = (signaled as PipelineRow[]).map((row) => {
1196:         const previous = beforeScores.get(row.id) ?? resolveBaseScore(row);
1197:         const next = resolveBaseScore(row);

1213:   }
1214: 
1215:   // -- 2d. Usage-weighted ranking --
