154: function isBm25Enabled(): boolean {
155:   const value = process.env.ENABLE_BM25?.trim().toLowerCase();
156:   if (!value) return true; // enabled by default
157:   if (BM25_DISABLED_VALUES.has(value)) return false;
158:   return BM25_ENABLED_VALUES.has(value);
159: }
160: 
161: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
162: // 2. HELPERS
163: 
164: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
165: /**
166:  * Count token frequency occurrences for BM25 scoring.
167:  *
168:  * @param tokens - Normalized tokens produced by {@link tokenize}.
169:  * @returns A frequency map keyed by token text.
170:  * @example
171:  * ```ts
172:  * getTermFrequencies(['memory', 'memory', 'search']).get('memory');
173:  * // 2
174:  * ```
175:  */
176: function getTermFrequencies(tokens: string[]): Map<string, number> {
177:   const freq = new Map<string, number>();
178:   for (const token of tokens) {
179:     freq.set(token, (freq.get(token) || 0) + 1);
180:   }
181:   return freq;
182: }
183: 
184: function stemNormalizedToken(word: string): string {
185:   let stem = word;
186:   let suffixRemoved = false;
187: 
188:   if (stem.endsWith('ing') && stem.length > 5) { stem = stem.slice(0, -3); suffixRemoved = true; }
189:   else if (stem.endsWith('tion') && stem.length > 6) { stem = stem.slice(0, -4); suffixRemoved = true; }
190:   else if (stem.endsWith('ed') && stem.length > 4) { stem = stem.slice(0, -2); suffixRemoved = true; }
191:   else if (stem.endsWith('ly') && stem.length > 4) { stem = stem.slice(0, -2); suffixRemoved = true; }
192:   else if (stem.endsWith('es') && stem.length > 4) { stem = stem.slice(0, -2); suffixRemoved = true; }
193:   else if (stem.endsWith('s') && stem.length > 3) { stem = stem.slice(0, -1); suffixRemoved = true; }
194: 
195:   if (suffixRemoved && stem.length >= 3) {
196:     const last = stem[stem.length - 1];
197:     if (last === stem[stem.length - 2] && !/[aeiou]/.test(last)) {
198:       stem = stem.slice(0, -1);
199:     }
200:   }
201: 
202:   return stem;
203: }
204: 
205: function bm25ContentNeedsNormalization(content: string): boolean {
206:   return (
207:     content.trim() !== content ||
208:     content.startsWith('---') ||
209:     content.includes('<!--') ||
210:     content.includes('```') ||
211:     content.includes('|') ||
212:     /(?:^|\n)\s*(?:[-*]\s+|\d+\.\s+|#{1,6}\s+)/.test(content) ||
213:     /\n{3,}/.test(content)
214:   );
215: }
216: 
217: function normalizeContentForBM25IfNeeded(content: string): string {
218:   return bm25ContentNeedsNormalization(content) ? normalizeContentForBM25(content) : content;
219: }
220: 
221: function hashBm25TokenSpan(text: string, start: number, end: number): number {
222:   let hash = 2166136261;
223:   for (let i = start; i < end; i += 1) {
224:     let code = text.charCodeAt(i);
225:     if (code >= 65 && code <= 90) {
226:       code += 32;
227:     }
228:     hash ^= code;
229:     hash = Math.imul(hash, 16777619);
230:   }
231:   return hash >>> 0;
232: }
233: 
234: function equalsBm25TokenSpan(candidate: string, text: string, start: number, end: number): boolean {
235:   if (candidate.length !== end - start) {
236:     return false;
237:   }
238: 
239:   for (let i = start; i < end; i += 1) {
240:     let code = text.charCodeAt(i);
241:     if (code >= 65 && code <= 90) {
242:       code += 32;
243:     }
244:     if (candidate.charCodeAt(i - start) !== code) {
245:       return false;
246:     }
247:   }
248: 
249:   return true;
250: }
251: 
252: function internBm25Token(
253:   text: string,
254:   start: number,
255:   end: number,
256:   hasUppercase: boolean,
257:   interns?: Bm25TokenInterns
258: ): string {
259:   if (!interns) {
260:     return hasUppercase ? text.slice(start, end).toLowerCase() : text.slice(start, end);
261:   }
262: 
263:   const hash = hashBm25TokenSpan(text, start, end);
264:   const bucket = interns.get(hash);
265:   if (bucket) {
266:     for (const candidate of bucket) {
267:       if (equalsBm25TokenSpan(candidate, text, start, end)) {
268:         return candidate;
269:       }
270:     }
271:   }
272: 
273:   const token = hasUppercase ? text.slice(start, end).toLowerCase() : text.slice(start, end);
274:   if (bucket) {
275:     bucket.push(token);
276:   } else {
277:     interns.set(hash, [token]);
278:   }
279:   return token;
280: }
281: 
282: function visitBm25Tokens(text: string, visitor: (token: string) => void, interns?: Bm25TokenInterns): void {
283:   if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return;
284: 
285:   let tokenStart = -1;
286:   let hasUppercase = false;
287:   const flush = (tokenEnd: number) => {
288:     if (tokenStart < 0) return;
289:     if (tokenEnd - tokenStart >= 2) {
290:       const token = internBm25Token(text, tokenStart, tokenEnd, hasUppercase, interns);
291:       if (!STOP_WORDS.has(token)) {
292:         visitor(stemNormalizedToken(token));
293:       }
294:     }
295:     tokenStart = -1;
296:     hasUppercase = false;
297:   };
298: 
299:   for (let i = 0; i < text.length; i += 1) {
300:     const code = text.charCodeAt(i);
301:     if (code >= 65 && code <= 90) {
302:       if (tokenStart < 0) tokenStart = i;
303:       hasUppercase = true;
304:     } else if ((code >= 97 && code <= 122) || (code >= 48 && code <= 57) || code === 45 || code === 95) {
305:       if (tokenStart < 0) tokenStart = i;
306:     } else if (tokenStart >= 0) {
307:       flush(i);
308:     }
309:   }
310: 
311:   flush(text.length);
312: }
313: 
314: function visitBm25FieldValue(
315:   value: BM25DocumentFields[BM25FieldName],
316:   visitor: (token: string) => void,
317:   interns?: Bm25TokenInterns
318: ): void {
319:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
320:     for (const entry of value) {
321:       visitBm25Tokens(entry, visitor, interns);
322:     }
323:     return;
324:   }
325: 
326:   visitBm25Tokens(value ?? '', visitor, interns);
327: }
328: 
329: function hasBm25DocumentText(fields: BM25DocumentFields): boolean {
330:   for (const fieldName of BM25_FIELD_NAMES) {
331:     const value = fields[fieldName];
332:     if (Array.isArray(value)) {
333:       if (value.some((entry) => typeof entry === 'string' && entry.trim().length > 0)) {
334:         return true;
335:       }
336:     } else if (typeof value === 'string' && value.trim().length > 0) {
337:       return true;
338:     }
339:   }
340:   return false;
341: }
342: 
343: function normalizeTriggerPhrasesForBM25(triggerPhrases: string | string[] | null | undefined): string {
344:   if (Array.isArray(triggerPhrases)) {
345:     return triggerPhrases
346:       .filter((phrase): phrase is string => typeof phrase === 'string' && phrase.trim().length > 0)
347:       .join(' ');
348:   }
349: 
350:   if (typeof triggerPhrases !== 'string') {
351:     return '';
352:   }
353: 
354:   const trimmed = triggerPhrases.trim();
355:   if (!trimmed) {
356:     return '';
357:   }
358: 
359:   try {
360:     const parsed = JSON.parse(trimmed) as unknown;
361:     if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
362:       return parsed
363:         .filter((phrase): phrase is string => typeof phrase === 'string' && phrase.trim().length > 0)
364:         .join(' ');
365:     }
366:   } catch {
367:     // Fall back to raw string when the database value is not JSON.
368:   }
369: 
370:   return trimmed;
371: }
372: 
373: function resolveBm25FieldWeights(overrides: Partial<BM25FieldWeights> = {}): BM25FieldWeights {
374:   return {
375:     title: overrides.title ?? BM25_FIELD_WEIGHTS.title,
376:     trigger_phrases: overrides.trigger_phrases ?? BM25_FIELD_WEIGHTS.trigger_phrases,
377:     content_generic: overrides.content_generic ?? BM25_FIELD_WEIGHTS.content_generic,
378:     body: overrides.body ?? BM25_FIELD_WEIGHTS.body,
379:   };
380: }
381: 
382: function emitBm25EngineSelection(engine: Bm25Engine | InMemoryBm25Engine, reason: string): void {
383:   const key = `${engine}:${reason}`;
384:   if (BM25_ENGINE_LOGGED.has(key)) {
385:     return;
386:   }
387:   BM25_ENGINE_LOGGED.add(key);
388:   // stderr keeps stdout clean for JSON-RPC frames under stdio transport.
389:   console.warn(`[bm25-index] BM25 engine selected: ${engine} (${reason})`);
390: }
391: 
392: function resolveInMemoryBm25Engine(): InMemoryBm25Engine {
393:   const configured = resolveBm25Engine();
394:   if (configured === 'legacy-inmemory') {
395:     emitBm25EngineSelection('legacy-inmemory', 'explicit legacy in-memory flag');
396:     return 'legacy-inmemory';
397:   }
398: 
399:   if (configured === 'sqlite') {
400:     emitBm25EngineSelection('packed-inmemory', 'sqlite mode requested an in-memory fallback instance');
401:     return 'packed-inmemory';
402:   }
403: 
404:   if (configured === 'packed-inmemory') {
405:     emitBm25EngineSelection('packed-inmemory', 'explicit packed in-memory flag');
406:     return 'packed-inmemory';
407:   }
408: 
409:   emitBm25EngineSelection('packed-inmemory', 'auto mode fallback');
410:   return 'packed-inmemory';
411: }
412: 
413: function buildBm25DocumentFields(row: BM25DocumentSource): BM25DocumentFields {
414:   return {
415:     title: typeof row.title === 'string' && row.title.trim() ? row.title.trim() : '',
416:     body: typeof row.content_text === 'string' && row.content_text.trim()
417:       ? normalizeContentForBM25IfNeeded(row.content_text)
418:       : '',
419:     trigger_phrases: normalizeTriggerPhrasesForBM25(row.trigger_phrases),
420:     content_generic: typeof row.file_path === 'string' && row.file_path.trim() ? row.file_path.trim() : '',
421:   };
422: }
423: 
424: function buildBm25DocumentText(row: BM25DocumentSource): string {
425:   const textParts: string[] = [];
426: 
427:   if (typeof row.title === 'string' && row.title.trim()) {
428:     textParts.push(row.title.trim());
429:   }
430: 
431:   if (typeof row.content_text === 'string' && row.content_text.trim()) {
432:     textParts.push(normalizeContentForBM25IfNeeded(row.content_text));
433:   }
434: 
435:   const triggerPhrases = normalizeTriggerPhrasesForBM25(row.trigger_phrases);
436:   if (triggerPhrases) {
437:     textParts.push(triggerPhrases);
438:   }
439: 
440:   if (typeof row.file_path === 'string' && row.file_path.trim()) {
441:     textParts.push(row.file_path.trim());
442:   }
443: 
444:   return textParts.join(' ').trim();
445: }
446: 
447: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
448: // 3. BM25 INDEX CLASS
449: 
450: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
451: class BM25Index {
452:   private k1: number;
453:   private b: number;
454:   private engine: InMemoryBm25Engine;
455:   private documents: Map<string, LegacyDocumentRecord>;
456:   private packedDocuments: Map<string, PackedDocumentRecord>;
457:   private packedDocIds: Array<string | undefined>;
458:   private packedFreeNumericIds: number[];
459:   private packedDocNumbersById: Map<string, number>;
460:   private packedMutablePostings: Map<string, PackedPostingMutable>;
461:   private packedPostings: Map<string, PackedPostingList>;
462:   private packedDirtyTerms: Set<string>;
463:   private packedTokenInterns: Bm25TokenInterns;
464:   private packedTermIdsByToken: Map<string, number>;
465:   private packedTermsById: string[];
466:   private packedScratchPositions: Int32Array;
467:   private packedScratchTermIds: number[];
468:   private packedScratchTotalTfs: number[];
469:   private packedScratchTitleTfs: number[];
470:   private packedScratchTriggerTfs: number[];
471:   private packedScratchPathTfs: number[];
472:   private packedScratchBodyTfs: number[];
473:   private documentFreq: Map<string, number>;
474:   private totalDocLength: number;
475:   private warmupHandle: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null;
476:   private warmupGeneration: number;
477: 
478:   constructor(
479:     k1: number = DEFAULT_K1,
480:     b: number = DEFAULT_B,
481:     engine: InMemoryBm25Engine = resolveInMemoryBm25Engine()
482:   ) {
483:     this.k1 = k1;
484:     this.b = b;
485:     this.engine = engine;
486:     this.documents = new Map();
487:     this.packedDocuments = new Map();
488:     this.packedDocIds = [];
489:     this.packedFreeNumericIds = [];
490:     this.packedDocNumbersById = new Map();
491:     this.packedMutablePostings = new Map();
492:     this.packedPostings = new Map();
493:     this.packedDirtyTerms = new Set();
494:     this.packedTokenInterns = new Map();
495:     this.packedTermIdsByToken = new Map();
496:     this.packedTermsById = [];
497:     this.packedScratchPositions = new Int32Array(16_384);
498:     this.packedScratchPositions.fill(-1);
499:     this.packedScratchTermIds = [];
500:     this.packedScratchTotalTfs = [];
501:     this.packedScratchTitleTfs = [];
502:     this.packedScratchTriggerTfs = [];
503:     this.packedScratchPathTfs = [];
504:     this.packedScratchBodyTfs = [];
505:     this.documentFreq = new Map();
506:     this.totalDocLength = 0;
507:     this.warmupHandle = null;
508:     this.warmupGeneration = 0;
509:   }
510: 
511:   addDocument(id: string, text: string): void {
512:     if (this.engine === 'packed-inmemory') {
513:       this.addDocumentFields(id, { body: text });
514:       return;
515:     }
516: 
517:     const tokens = tokenize(text);
518:     const termFreq = getTermFrequencies(tokens);
519: 
520:     if (this.documents.has(id)) {
521:       this.removeDocument(id);
522:     }
523: 
524:     this.documents.set(id, { tokens, termFreq });
525:     this.totalDocLength += tokens.length;
526: 
527:     // Update document frequency
528:     for (const term of termFreq.keys()) {
529:       this.documentFreq.set(term, (this.documentFreq.get(term) || 0) + 1);
530:     }
531:   }
532: 
533:   addDocumentFields(id: string, fields: BM25DocumentFields): void {
534:     if (this.engine === 'legacy-inmemory') {
535:       this.addDocument(id, this.joinDocumentFields(fields));
536:       return;
537:     }
538: 
539:     if (this.packedDocuments.has(id)) {
540:       this.removeDocument(id);
541:     }
542: 
543:     this.collectPackedTermFrequencies(fields);
544:     try {
545:       let length = 0;
546:       for (const totalTf of this.packedScratchTotalTfs) {
547:         length += totalTf;
548:       }
549:       if (length === 0) {
550:         return;
551:       }
552: 
553:       const numericId = this.getPackedNumericId(id);
554:       this.packedDocuments.set(id, {
555:         numericId,
556:         id,
557:         length,
558:         termIds: this.createPackedDocumentTermIds(),
559:       });
560:       this.totalDocLength += length;
561: 
562:       for (let i = 0; i < this.packedScratchTermIds.length; i += 1) {
563:         const term = this.packedTermsById[this.packedScratchTermIds[i]];
564:         const postings = this.ensurePackedMutablePostings(term);
565:         this.setPackedMutablePosting(
566:           postings,
567:           numericId,
568:           this.packedScratchTitleTfs[i],
569:           this.packedScratchTriggerTfs[i],
570:           this.packedScratchPathTfs[i],
571:           this.packedScratchBodyTfs[i]
572:         );
573:         this.packedDirtyTerms.add(term);
574:         this.documentFreq.set(term, (this.documentFreq.get(term) || 0) + 1);
575:       }
576:     } finally {
577:       this.clearPackedFrequencyScratch();
578:     }
579:   }
580: 
581:   removeDocument(id: string): boolean {
582:     if (this.engine === 'packed-inmemory') {
583:       return this.removePackedDocument(id);
584:     }
585: 
586:     const doc = this.documents.get(id);
587:     if (!doc) return false;
588: 
589:     this.totalDocLength -= doc.tokens.length;
590: 
591:     for (const term of doc.termFreq.keys()) {
592:       const count = this.documentFreq.get(term) || 0;
593:       if (count <= 1) {
594:         this.documentFreq.delete(term);
595:       } else {
596:         this.documentFreq.set(term, count - 1);
597:       }
598:     }
599: 
600:     this.documents.delete(id);
601:     return true;
602:   }
603: 
604:   calculateIdf(term: string): number {
605:     const n = this.getDocumentCount();
606:     const df = this.documentFreq.get(term) || 0;
607:     if (df === 0 || n === 0) return 0;
608:     return Math.log((n - df + 0.5) / (df + 0.5) + 1);
609:   }
610: 
611:   calculateScore(queryTokens: string[], docId: string, options: BM25SearchOptions = {}): number {
612:     if (this.engine === 'packed-inmemory') {
613:       return this.calculatePackedScore(queryTokens, docId, options);
614:     }
615: 
616:     const doc = this.documents.get(docId);
617:     if (!doc) return 0;
618: 
619:     const avgDl = this.getAverageDocumentLength();
620:     const dl = doc.tokens.length;
621: 
622:     let score = 0;
623:     for (const term of queryTokens) {
624:       const tf = doc.termFreq.get(term) || 0;
625:       if (tf === 0) continue;
626: 
627:       const idf = this.calculateIdf(term);
628:       const numerator = tf * (this.k1 + 1);
629:       const denominator = tf + this.k1 * (1 - this.b + this.b * (dl / Math.max(avgDl, 1)));
630:       score += idf * (numerator / denominator);
631:     }
632: 
633:     return score;
634:   }
635: 
636:   search(query: string, limit: number = 10, options: BM25SearchOptions = {}): BM25SearchResult[] {
637:     const queryTokens = normalizeLexicalQueryTokens(query).bm25;
638:     if (queryTokens.length === 0) return [];
639: 
640:     if (this.engine === 'packed-inmemory') {
641:       return this.searchPacked(queryTokens, limit, options);
642:     }
643: 
644:     const results: BM25SearchResult[] = [];
645: 
646:     for (const [id] of this.documents) {
647:       const score = this.calculateScore(queryTokens, id);
648:       if (score > 0) {
649:         results.push({ id, score });
650:       }
651:     }
652: 
653:     return results
654:       .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
655:       .slice(0, limit);
656:   }
657: 
658:   getStats(): BM25Stats {
659:     return {
660:       documentCount: this.getDocumentCount(),
661:       termCount: this.documentFreq.size,
662:       avgDocLength: this.getAverageDocumentLength(),
663:     };
664:   }
665: 
666:   clear(): void {
667:     this.cancelWarmup();
668:     this.documents.clear();
669:     this.packedDocuments.clear();
670:     this.packedDocIds = [];
671:     this.packedFreeNumericIds = [];
672:     this.packedDocNumbersById.clear();
673:     this.packedMutablePostings.clear();
674:     this.packedPostings.clear();
675:     this.packedDirtyTerms.clear();
676:     this.packedTokenInterns.clear();
677:     this.packedTermIdsByToken.clear();
678:     this.packedTermsById = [];
679:     this.packedScratchPositions.fill(-1);
680:     this.clearPackedFrequencyScratch();
681:     this.documentFreq.clear();
682:     this.totalDocLength = 0;
683:   }
684: 
685:   addDocuments(docs: Array<{ id: string; text: string }>): void {
686:     for (const doc of docs) {
687:       this.addDocument(doc.id, doc.text);
688:     }
689:   }
690: 
691:   finalizePackedPostings(): void {
692:     if (this.engine === 'legacy-inmemory') {
693:       return;
694:     }
695: 
696:     for (const term of Array.from(this.packedDirtyTerms)) {
697:       this.getPackedPosting(term);
698:     }
699:     this.packedMutablePostings.clear();
700:   }
701: 
702:   /**
703:    * Incrementally synchronize changed rows from the database into the in-memory index.
704:    */
705:   syncChangedRows(database: Database.Database, rowIds: Array<number | string>): number {
706:     const normalizedIds = Array.from(
707:       new Set(
708:         rowIds
709:           .map((rowId) => Number(rowId))
710:           .filter((rowId) => Number.isInteger(rowId) && rowId > 0)
711:       )
712:     );
713: 
714:     if (normalizedIds.length === 0) {
715:       return 0;
716:     }
717: 
718:     try {
719:       const placeholders = normalizedIds.map(() => '?').join(', ');
720:       const rows = (database.prepare(
721:         `SELECT id, title, content_text, trigger_phrases, file_path
722:          FROM memory_index
723:          WHERE id IN (${placeholders})`
724:       ) as Database.Statement).all(...normalizedIds) as Array<{
725:         id: number;
726:         title: string | null;
727:         content_text: string | null;
728:         trigger_phrases: string | null;
729:         file_path: string | null;
730:       }>;
731: 
732:       const activeRowMap = new Map<number, typeof rows[number]>();
733:       for (const row of rows) {
734:         activeRowMap.set(row.id, row);
735:       }
736: 
737:       for (const rowId of normalizedIds) {
738:         const row = activeRowMap.get(rowId);
739:         if (!row) {
740:           this.removeDocument(String(rowId));
741:           continue;
742:         }
743: 
744:         const fields = buildBm25DocumentFields(row);
745:         if (hasBm25DocumentText(fields)) {
746:           this.addDocumentFields(String(row.id), fields);
747:         } else {
748:           this.removeDocument(String(row.id));
749:         }
750:       }
751: 
752:       return normalizedIds.length;
753:     } catch (error: unknown) {
754:       const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
755:       console.warn(`[bm25-index] Failed to sync BM25 rows: ${msg}`);
756:       return 0;
757:     }
758:   }
759: 
760:   /**
761:    * Defer full startup warmup into batched row-ID syncs so process
762:    * initialization is not blocked by a monolithic in-memory rebuild.
763:    */
764:   rebuildFromDatabase(database: Database.Database): number {
765:     this.clear();
766: 
767:     try {
768:       const rows = (database.prepare(
769:         `SELECT id
770:          FROM memory_index
771:          ORDER BY id`
772:       ) as Database.Statement).all() as Array<{ id: number }>;
773: 
774:       const pendingIds = rows.map((row) => row.id);
775:       if (pendingIds.length === 0) {
776:         return 0;
777:       }
778: 
779:       const warmupGeneration = ++this.warmupGeneration;
780:       const processBatch = () => {
781:         if (warmupGeneration !== this.warmupGeneration) {
782:           return;
783:         }
784: 
785:         const batchIds = pendingIds.splice(0, BM25_WARMUP_BATCH_SIZE);
786:         if (batchIds.length === 0) {
787:           this.finalizePackedPostings();
788:           this.warmupHandle = null;
789:           return;
790:         }
791: 
792:         this.syncChangedRows(database, batchIds);
793: 
794:         if (pendingIds.length > 0) {
795:           this.warmupHandle = registerTimeout(processBatch, 0, { unref: true });
796:         } else {
797:           // The queue drains on the last non-empty batch, so the empty-batch
798:           // finalize above never runs on this path. Finalize here too, or the
799:           // whole corpus stays in mutable number[] postings and the packed
800:           // engine's RAM bound is lost until every term is searched.
801:           this.finalizePackedPostings();
802:           this.warmupHandle = null;
803:         }
804:       };
805: 
806:       this.warmupHandle = registerTimeout(processBatch, 0, { unref: true });
807:       return pendingIds.length;
808:     } catch (error: unknown) {
809:       const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
810:       console.warn(`[bm25-index] Failed to schedule BM25 warmup: ${msg}`);
811:       return 0;
812:     }
813:   }
814: 
815:   cancelWarmup(): void {
816:     this.warmupGeneration += 1;
817:     if (this.warmupHandle) {
818:       clearRegisteredTimer(this.warmupHandle);
819:       this.warmupHandle = null;
820:     }
821:   }
822: 
823:   private getDocumentCount(): number {
824:     return this.engine === 'packed-inmemory' ? this.packedDocuments.size : this.documents.size;
825:   }
826: 
827:   private getAverageDocumentLength(): number {
828:     const documentCount = this.getDocumentCount();
829:     return documentCount > 0 ? this.totalDocLength / documentCount : 0;
830:   }
831: 
832:   private joinDocumentFields(fields: BM25DocumentFields): string {
833:     const parts: string[] = [];
834:     for (const fieldName of BM25_FIELD_NAMES) {
835:       const value = fields[fieldName];
836:       if (Array.isArray(value)) {
837:         parts.push(value.join(' '));
838:       } else if (typeof value === 'string' && value.trim()) {
839:         parts.push(value.trim());
840:       }
841:     }
842:     return parts.join(' ').trim();
843:   }
844: 
845:   private getPackedNumericId(id: string): number {
846:     const existing = this.packedDocNumbersById.get(id);
847:     if (existing !== undefined) {
848:       return existing;
849:     }
850: 
851:     // Reuse a slot freed by a prior removal before extending, so packedDocIds is
852:     // bounded by the live document count rather than cumulative write volume.
853:     const recycled = this.packedFreeNumericIds.pop();
854:     const numericId = recycled ?? this.packedDocIds.length;
855:     this.packedDocIds[numericId] = id;
856:     this.packedDocNumbersById.set(id, numericId);
857:     return numericId;
858:   }
859: 
860:   private collectPackedTermFrequencies(fields: BM25DocumentFields): void {
861:     for (const fieldName of BM25_FIELD_NAMES) {
862:       visitBm25FieldValue(
863:         fields[fieldName],
864:         (token) => this.recordPackedTokenFrequency(token, fieldName),
865:         this.packedTokenInterns
866:       );
867:     }
868:   }
869: 
870:   private recordPackedTokenFrequency(token: string, fieldName: BM25FieldName): void {
871:     const termId = this.getPackedTermId(token);
872:     let scratchIndex = this.packedScratchPositions[termId];
873:     if (scratchIndex < 0) {
874:       scratchIndex = this.packedScratchTermIds.length;
875:       this.packedScratchPositions[termId] = scratchIndex;
876:       this.packedScratchTermIds.push(termId);
877:       this.packedScratchTotalTfs.push(0);
878:       this.packedScratchTitleTfs.push(0);
879:       this.packedScratchTriggerTfs.push(0);
880:       this.packedScratchPathTfs.push(0);
881:       this.packedScratchBodyTfs.push(0);
882:     }
883: 
884:     this.packedScratchTotalTfs[scratchIndex] += 1;
885:     if (fieldName === 'title') this.packedScratchTitleTfs[scratchIndex] += 1;
886:     else if (fieldName === 'trigger_phrases') this.packedScratchTriggerTfs[scratchIndex] += 1;
887:     else if (fieldName === 'content_generic') this.packedScratchPathTfs[scratchIndex] += 1;
888:     else this.packedScratchBodyTfs[scratchIndex] += 1;
889:   }
890: 
891:   private getPackedTermId(token: string): number {
892:     const existing = this.packedTermIdsByToken.get(token);
893:     if (existing !== undefined) {
894:       return existing;
895:     }
896: 
897:     const termId = this.packedTermsById.length;
898:     this.packedTermIdsByToken.set(token, termId);
899:     this.packedTermsById.push(token);
900:     this.ensurePackedScratchPositionCapacity(termId + 1);
901:     return termId;
902:   }
903: 
904:   private ensurePackedScratchPositionCapacity(minimum: number): void {
905:     if (this.packedScratchPositions.length >= minimum) {
906:       return;
907:     }
908: 
909:     let capacity = this.packedScratchPositions.length;
910:     while (capacity < minimum) {
911:       capacity *= 2;
912:     }
913: 
914:     const next = new Int32Array(capacity);
915:     next.fill(-1);
916:     next.set(this.packedScratchPositions);
917:     this.packedScratchPositions = next;
918:   }
919: 
920:   private clearPackedFrequencyScratch(): void {
921:     for (const termId of this.packedScratchTermIds) {
922:       this.packedScratchPositions[termId] = -1;
923:     }
924:     this.packedScratchTermIds.length = 0;
925:     this.packedScratchTotalTfs.length = 0;
926:     this.packedScratchTitleTfs.length = 0;
927:     this.packedScratchTriggerTfs.length = 0;
928:     this.packedScratchPathTfs.length = 0;
929:     this.packedScratchBodyTfs.length = 0;
930:   }
931: 
932:   private createPackedDocumentTermIds(): Uint16Array | Uint32Array {
933:     for (const termId of this.packedScratchTermIds) {
934:       if (termId > PACKED_POSTING_MAX_NARROW_TERM_ID) {
935:         return Uint32Array.from(this.packedScratchTermIds);
936:       }
937:     }
938: 
939:     return Uint16Array.from(this.packedScratchTermIds);
940:   }
941: 
942:   private removePackedDocument(id: string): boolean {
943:     const doc = this.packedDocuments.get(id);
944:     if (!doc) return false;
945: 
946:     this.totalDocLength -= doc.length;
947: 
948:     for (const termId of doc.termIds) {
949:       const term = this.packedTermsById[termId];
950:       const postings = this.ensurePackedMutablePostings(term);
951:       this.deletePackedMutablePosting(postings, doc.numericId);
952:       this.packedDirtyTerms.add(term);
953: 
954:       const count = this.documentFreq.get(term) || 0;
955:       if (count <= 1) {
956:         this.documentFreq.delete(term);
957:         this.packedMutablePostings.delete(term);
958:         this.packedPostings.delete(term);
959:       } else {
960:         this.documentFreq.set(term, count - 1);
961:       }
962:     }
963: 
964:     this.packedDocuments.delete(id);
965:     this.packedDocIds[doc.numericId] = undefined;
966:     this.packedFreeNumericIds.push(doc.numericId);
967:     this.packedDocNumbersById.delete(id);
968:     return true;
969:   }
970: 
971:   private getPackedPosting(term: string): PackedPostingList | undefined {
972:     if (!this.packedDirtyTerms.has(term)) {
973:       return this.packedPostings.get(term);
974:     }
975: 
976:     const mutable = this.packedMutablePostings.get(term);
977:     if (!mutable || mutable.length === 0) {
978:       this.packedDirtyTerms.delete(term);
979:       this.packedPostings.delete(term);
980:       return undefined;
981:     }
982: 
983:     this.sortPackedMutablePosting(mutable);
984:     this.packedPostings.set(term, mutable);
985:     this.packedMutablePostings.delete(term);
986:     this.packedDirtyTerms.delete(term);
987:     return mutable;
988:   }
989: 
990:   private ensurePackedMutablePostings(term: string): PackedPostingMutable {
991:     const existing = this.packedMutablePostings.get(term);
992:     if (existing) {
993:       return existing;
994:     }
995: 
996:     const packed = this.packedPostings.get(term);
997:     if (packed) {
998:       this.packedPostings.delete(term);
999:       this.packedMutablePostings.set(term, packed);
1000:       return packed;
1001:     }
1002: 
1003:     const hydrated = this.createPackedMutablePosting();
1004:     this.packedMutablePostings.set(term, hydrated);
1005:     return hydrated;
1006:   }
1007: 
1008:   private createPackedMutablePosting(): PackedPostingMutable {
1009:     return {
1010:       docIdChunks: [],
1011:       fieldTfChunks: [],
1012:       length: 0,
1013:       sorted: true,
1014:       wideDocIds: false,
1015:       fieldTfWidth: 1,
1016:     };
1017:   }
1018: 
1019:   private ensurePackedDocIdChunk(
1020:     postings: PackedPostingMutable,
1021:     index: number
1022:   ): Uint16Array | Uint32Array {
1023:     const chunkIndex = Math.floor(index / PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE);
1024:     let chunk = postings.docIdChunks[chunkIndex];
1025:     if (!chunk) {
1026:       chunk = postings.wideDocIds
1027:         ? new Uint32Array(PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE)
1028:         : new Uint16Array(PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE);
1029:       postings.docIdChunks[chunkIndex] = chunk;
1030:     }
1031:     return chunk;
1032:   }
1033: 
1034:   private ensurePackedFieldTfChunk(
1035:     postings: PackedPostingMutable,
1036:     index: number
1037:   ): Uint8Array | Uint16Array | Uint32Array {
1038:     const chunkIndex = Math.floor(index / PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE);
1039:     let chunk = postings.fieldTfChunks[chunkIndex];
1040:     if (!chunk) {
1041:       const length = PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE * PACKED_POSTING_FIELD_WIDTH;
1042:       chunk = this.createPackedFieldTfChunk(length, postings.fieldTfWidth);
1043:       postings.fieldTfChunks[chunkIndex] = chunk;
1044:     }
1045:     return chunk;
1046:   }
1047: 
1048:   private createPackedFieldTfChunk(
1049:     length: number,
1050:     width: PackedFieldTfWidth
1051:   ): Uint8Array | Uint16Array | Uint32Array {
1052:     if (width === 1) return new Uint8Array(length);
1053:     if (width === 2) return new Uint16Array(length);
1054:     return new Uint32Array(length);
1055:   }
1056: 
1057:   private requiredPackedFieldTfWidth(
1058:     titleTf: number,
1059:     triggerTf: number,
1060:     pathTf: number,
1061:     bodyTf: number
1062:   ): PackedFieldTfWidth {
1063:     if (
1064:       titleTf > PACKED_POSTING_MAX_NARROW_TF ||
1065:       triggerTf > PACKED_POSTING_MAX_NARROW_TF ||
1066:       pathTf > PACKED_POSTING_MAX_NARROW_TF ||
1067:       bodyTf > PACKED_POSTING_MAX_NARROW_TF
1068:     ) {
1069:       return 4;
1070:     }
1071: 
1072:     if (
1073:       titleTf > PACKED_POSTING_MAX_BYTE_TF ||
1074:       triggerTf > PACKED_POSTING_MAX_BYTE_TF ||
1075:       pathTf > PACKED_POSTING_MAX_BYTE_TF ||
1076:       bodyTf > PACKED_POSTING_MAX_BYTE_TF
1077:     ) {
1078:       return 2;
1079:     }
1080: 
1081:     return 1;
1082:   }
1083: 
1084:   private ensurePackedDocIdWidth(postings: PackedPostingMutable, docId: number): void {
1085:     if (postings.wideDocIds || docId <= PACKED_POSTING_MAX_NARROW_DOC_ID) {
1086:       return;
1087:     }
1088: 
1089:     for (let i = 0; i < postings.docIdChunks.length; i += 1) {
1090:       const chunk = postings.docIdChunks[i];
1091:       if (!chunk) continue;
1092:       const widened = new Uint32Array(chunk.length);
1093:       widened.set(chunk);
1094:       postings.docIdChunks[i] = widened;
1095:     }
1096:     postings.wideDocIds = true;
1097:   }
1098: 
1099:   private ensurePackedFieldTfWidth(
1100:     postings: PackedPostingMutable,
1101:     titleTf: number,
1102:     triggerTf: number,
1103:     pathTf: number,
1104:     bodyTf: number
1105:   ): void {
1106:     const requiredWidth = this.requiredPackedFieldTfWidth(
1107:       titleTf,
1108:       triggerTf,
1109:       pathTf,
1110:       bodyTf
1111:     );
1112:     if (postings.fieldTfWidth >= requiredWidth) {
1113:       return;
1114:     }
1115: 
1116:     for (let i = 0; i < postings.fieldTfChunks.length; i += 1) {
1117:       const chunk = postings.fieldTfChunks[i];
1118:       if (!chunk) continue;
1119:       const widened = this.createPackedFieldTfChunk(chunk.length, requiredWidth);
1120:       widened.set(chunk);
1121:       postings.fieldTfChunks[i] = widened;
1122:     }
1123:     postings.fieldTfWidth = requiredWidth;
1124:   }
1125: 
1126:   private getPackedPostingDocId(postings: PackedPostingList, index: number): number {
1127:     const chunk = postings.docIdChunks[Math.floor(index / PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE)];
1128:     return chunk[index % PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE];
1129:   }
1130: 
1131:   private getPackedPostingFieldTf(
1132:     postings: PackedPostingList,
1133:     index: number,
1134:     fieldOffset: number
1135:   ): number {
1136:     const chunk = postings.fieldTfChunks[Math.floor(index / PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE)];
1137:     const offset = (index % PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE) * PACKED_POSTING_FIELD_WIDTH +
1138:       fieldOffset;
1139:     return chunk[offset];
1140:   }
1141: 
1142:   private getPackedMutableEntry(
1143:     postings: PackedPostingMutable,
1144:     index: number
1145:   ): PackedPostingEntry {
1146:     const docIdChunk = postings.docIdChunks[Math.floor(index / PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE)];
1147:     const fieldTfChunk = postings.fieldTfChunks[Math.floor(index / PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE)];
1148:     const docOffset = index % PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE;
1149:     const fieldOffset = docOffset * PACKED_POSTING_FIELD_WIDTH;
1150:     return {
1151:       docId: docIdChunk[docOffset],
1152:       titleTf: fieldTfChunk[fieldOffset + PACKED_POSTING_TITLE_OFFSET],
1153:       triggerTf: fieldTfChunk[fieldOffset + PACKED_POSTING_TRIGGER_OFFSET],
1154:       pathTf: fieldTfChunk[fieldOffset + PACKED_POSTING_PATH_OFFSET],
1155:       bodyTf: fieldTfChunk[fieldOffset + PACKED_POSTING_BODY_OFFSET],
1156:     };
1157:   }
1158: 
1159:   private setPackedMutableEntry(
1160:     postings: PackedPostingMutable,
1161:     index: number,
1162:     entry: PackedPostingEntry
1163:   ): void {
1164:     this.ensurePackedDocIdWidth(postings, entry.docId);
1165:     this.ensurePackedFieldTfWidth(
1166:       postings,
1167:       entry.titleTf,
1168:       entry.triggerTf,
1169:       entry.pathTf,
1170:       entry.bodyTf
1171:     );
1172:     const docIdChunk = this.ensurePackedDocIdChunk(postings, index);
1173:     const fieldTfChunk = this.ensurePackedFieldTfChunk(postings, index);
1174:     const docOffset = index % PACKED_POSTING_CHUNK_SIZE;
1175:     const fieldOffset = docOffset * PACKED_POSTING_FIELD_WIDTH;
1176:     docIdChunk[docOffset] = entry.docId;
1177:     fieldTfChunk[fieldOffset + PACKED_POSTING_TITLE_OFFSET] = entry.titleTf;
1178:     fieldTfChunk[fieldOffset + PACKED_POSTING_TRIGGER_OFFSET] = entry.triggerTf;
1179:     fieldTfChunk[fieldOffset + PACKED_POSTING_PATH_OFFSET] = entry.pathTf;
1180:     fieldTfChunk[fieldOffset + PACKED_POSTING_BODY_OFFSET] = entry.bodyTf;
1181:   }
1182: 
1183:   private appendPackedMutableEntry(
1184:     postings: PackedPostingMutable,
1185:     entry: PackedPostingEntry
1186:   ): void {
1187:     const lastDocId = postings.length > 0
1188:       ? this.getPackedPostingDocId(postings, postings.length - 1)
1189:       : -1;
1190:     if (lastDocId > entry.docId) {
1191:       postings.sorted = false;
1192:     }
1193:     this.setPackedMutableEntry(postings, postings.length, entry);
1194:     postings.length += 1;
1195:   }
1196: 
1197:   private setPackedMutablePosting(
1198:     postings: PackedPostingMutable,
1199:     numericId: number,
1200:     titleTf: number,
1201:     triggerTf: number,
1202:     pathTf: number,
1203:     bodyTf: number
1204:   ): void {
1205:     let existingIndex = -1;
1206:     for (let i = 0; i < postings.length; i += 1) {
1207:       if (this.getPackedPostingDocId(postings, i) === numericId) {
1208:         existingIndex = i;
1209:         break;
1210:       }
1211:     }
1212:     if (existingIndex >= 0) {
1213:       this.setPackedMutableEntry(postings, existingIndex, {
1214:         docId: numericId,
1215:         titleTf,
1216:         triggerTf,
1217:         pathTf,
1218:         bodyTf,
1219:       });
1220:       return;
1221:     }
1222: 
1223:     this.appendPackedMutableEntry(postings, {
1224:       docId: numericId,
1225:       titleTf,
1226:       triggerTf,
1227:       pathTf,
1228:       bodyTf,
1229:     });
1230:   }
1231: 
1232:   private deletePackedMutablePosting(postings: PackedPostingMutable, numericId: number): void {
1233:     let index = -1;
1234:     for (let i = 0; i < postings.length; i += 1) {
1235:       if (this.getPackedPostingDocId(postings, i) === numericId) {
1236:         index = i;
1237:         break;
1238:       }
1239:     }
1240:     if (index < 0) {
1241:       return;
1242:     }
1243:     if (index < postings.length - 1) {
1244:       for (let i = index + 1; i < postings.length; i += 1) {
1245:         this.setPackedMutableEntry(
1246:           postings,
1247:           i - 1,
1248:           this.getPackedMutableEntry(postings, i)
1249:         );
1250:       }
1251:     }
1252:     postings.length -= 1;
1253:   }
1254: 
1255:   private sortPackedMutablePosting(postings: PackedPostingMutable): void {
1256:     if (postings.sorted) {
1257:       return;
1258:     }
1259: 
1260:     for (let i = 1; i < postings.length; i += 1) {
1261:       const entry = this.getPackedMutableEntry(postings, i);
1262:       let j = i - 1;
1263: 
1264:       while (j >= 0 && this.getPackedPostingDocId(postings, j) > entry.docId) {
1265:         this.setPackedMutableEntry(
1266:           postings,
1267:           j + 1,
1268:           this.getPackedMutableEntry(postings, j)
1269:         );
1270:         j -= 1;
1271:       }
1272: 
1273:       this.setPackedMutableEntry(postings, j + 1, entry);
1274:     }
1275: 
1276:     postings.sorted = true;
1277:   }
1278: 
1279:   private calculatePackedScore(
1280:     queryTokens: string[],
1281:     docId: string,
1282:     options: BM25SearchOptions
1283:   ): number {
1284:     const doc = this.packedDocuments.get(docId);
1285:     if (!doc) return 0;
1286: 
1287:     const weights = resolveBm25FieldWeights(options.fieldWeights);
1288:     const avgDl = Math.max(this.getAverageDocumentLength(), 1);
1289:     let score = 0;
1290: 
1291:     for (const term of queryTokens) {
1292:       const postings = this.getPackedPosting(term);
1293:       if (!postings) continue;
1294:       const postingIndex = this.findPackedPostingIndex(postings, doc.numericId);
1295:       if (postingIndex < 0) continue;
1296: 
1297:       const weightedTf = this.calculateWeightedPostingFrequency(postings, postingIndex, weights);
1298:       if (weightedTf <= 0) continue;
1299: 
1300:       const idf = this.calculateIdf(term);
1301:       score += this.calculateBm25TermScore(weightedTf, doc.length, avgDl, idf);
1302:     }
1303: 
1304:     return score;
1305:   }
1306: 
1307:   private searchPacked(
1308:     queryTokens: string[],
1309:     limit: number,
1310:     options: BM25SearchOptions
1311:   ): BM25SearchResult[] {
1312:     const weights = resolveBm25FieldWeights(options.fieldWeights);
1313:     const avgDl = Math.max(this.getAverageDocumentLength(), 1);
1314:     const scores = new Map<number, number>();
1315: 
1316:     for (const term of queryTokens) {
1317:       const postings = this.getPackedPosting(term);
1318:       if (!postings) continue;
1319: 
1320:       const idf = this.calculateIdf(term);
1321:       for (let i = 0; i < postings.length; i += 1) {
1322:         const numericId = this.getPackedPostingDocId(postings, i);
1323:         const id = this.packedDocIds[numericId];
1324:         if (!id) continue;
1325:         const doc = this.packedDocuments.get(id);
1326:         if (!doc) continue;
1327: 
1328:         const weightedTf = this.calculateWeightedPostingFrequency(postings, i, weights);
1329:         if (weightedTf <= 0) continue;
1330: 
1331:         const termScore = this.calculateBm25TermScore(weightedTf, doc.length, avgDl, idf);
1332:         scores.set(numericId, (scores.get(numericId) || 0) + termScore);
1333:       }
1334:     }
1335: 
1336:     return Array.from(scores.entries())
1337:       .map(([numericId, score]) => ({ id: this.packedDocIds[numericId], score }))
1338:       .filter((result): result is BM25SearchResult => typeof result.id === 'string' && result.score > 0)
1339:       .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
1340:       .slice(0, limit);
1341:   }
1342: 
1343:   private calculateWeightedPostingFrequency(
1344:     postings: PackedPostingList,
1345:     index: number,
1346:     weights: BM25FieldWeights
1347:   ): number {
1348:     const titleTf = this.getPackedPostingFieldTf(postings, index, PACKED_POSTING_TITLE_OFFSET);
1349:     const triggerTf = this.getPackedPostingFieldTf(postings, index, PACKED_POSTING_TRIGGER_OFFSET);
1350:     const pathTf = this.getPackedPostingFieldTf(postings, index, PACKED_POSTING_PATH_OFFSET);
1351:     const bodyTf = this.getPackedPostingFieldTf(postings, index, PACKED_POSTING_BODY_OFFSET);
1352: 
1353:     return (
1354:       titleTf * weights.title +
1355:       triggerTf * weights.trigger_phrases +
1356:       pathTf * weights.content_generic +
1357:       bodyTf * weights.body
1358:     );
1359:   }
1360: 
1361:   private findPackedPostingIndex(postings: PackedPostingList, numericId: number): number {
1362:     let low = 0;
1363:     let high = postings.length - 1;
1364:     while (low <= high) {
1365:       const mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);
1366:       const value = this.getPackedPostingDocId(postings, mid);
1367:       if (value === numericId) return mid;
1368:       if (value < numericId) {
1369:         low = mid + 1;
1370:       } else {
1371:         high = mid - 1;
1372:       }
1373:     }
1374:     return -1;
1375:   }
1376: 
1377:   private calculateBm25TermScore(tf: number, dl: number, avgDl: number, idf: number): number {
1378:     const numerator = tf * (this.k1 + 1);
1379:     const denominator = tf + this.k1 * (1 - this.b + this.b * (dl / avgDl));
1380:     return idf * (numerator / denominator);
1381:   }
1382: }
1383: 
1384: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1385: // 4. SINGLETON
1386: 
1387: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1388: let indexInstance: BM25Index | null = null;
1389: 
1390: /**
1391:  * Retrieve the shared in-memory BM25 index singleton.
1392:  *
1393:  * @returns The process-wide {@link BM25Index} instance.
1394:  * @example
1395:  * ```ts
1396:  * const index = getIndex();
1397:  * index.addDocument('123', 'memory search');
1398:  * ```
1399:  */
1400: function getIndex(): BM25Index {
1401:   if (!indexInstance) {
1402:     indexInstance = new BM25Index();
1403:   }
1404:   return indexInstance;
1405: }
1406: 
1407: /**
1408:  * Reset the shared BM25 index singleton.
1409:  *
1410:  * @returns Nothing.
1411:  * @example
1412:  * ```ts
1413:  * resetIndex();
1414:  * ```
1415:  */
1416: function resetIndex(): void {
1417:   indexInstance?.cancelWarmup();
1418:   indexInstance = null;
1419: }
1420: 
1421: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1422: // 5. LEXICAL ENGINE ROUTING
1423: 
1424: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1425: function resolveBm25Engine(): Bm25Engine {
1426:   const value = process.env.SPECKIT_BM25_ENGINE?.trim().toLowerCase();
1427:   if (!value) {
1428:     return 'auto';
1429:   }
1430: 
1431:   if ((BM25_ENGINE_VALUES as readonly string[]).includes(value)) {
1432:     return value as Bm25Engine;
1433:   }
1434: 
1435:   console.warn(`[bm25-index] Unsupported SPECKIT_BM25_ENGINE=${value}; falling back to auto`);
1436:   return 'auto';
1437: }
1438: 
1439: function isMemoryFtsAvailable(database: Database.Database | null | undefined): boolean {
1440:   if (!database) {
1441:     return false;
1442:   }
1443: 
1444:   try {
1445:     const result = (database.prepare(
1446:       `SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='memory_fts'`
1447:     ) as Database.Statement).get() as { name: string } | undefined;
1448:     return !!result;
1449:   } catch {
1450:     return false;
1451:   }
1452: }
1453: 
1454: function shouldWarmInMemoryBm25(database: Database.Database | null | undefined): boolean {
1455:   if (!isBm25Enabled()) {
1456:     return false;
1457:   }
1458: 
1459:   const engine = resolveBm25Engine();
1460:   emitBm25EngineSelection(engine, 'warmup routing');
1461:   if (engine === 'sqlite') {
1462:     if (!isMemoryFtsAvailable(database)) {
1463:       throw new Error('SPECKIT_BM25_ENGINE=sqlite requires the memory_fts table; JS BM25 warmup is disabled in sqlite mode');
1464:     }
1465:     return false;
1466:   }
1467: 
1468:   if (engine === 'auto') {
1469:     return !isMemoryFtsAvailable(database);
1470:   }
1471: 
1472:   if (engine === 'packed-inmemory') {
1473:     return true;
1474:   }
1475: 
1476:   return true;
1477: }
1478: 
1479: function shouldUseSqliteLexicalEngine(database: Database.Database | null | undefined): boolean {
1480:   const engine = resolveBm25Engine();
1481:   emitBm25EngineSelection(engine, 'lexical routing');
1482:   if (engine === 'sqlite') {
1483:     if (!isMemoryFtsAvailable(database)) {
1484:       throw new Error('SPECKIT_BM25_ENGINE=sqlite requires the memory_fts table for lexical BM25 search');
1485:     }
1486:     return true;
1487:   }
1488: 
1489:   if (engine === 'auto') {
1490:     return isMemoryFtsAvailable(database);
1491:   }
1492: 
1493:   return false;
1494: }
1495: 
1496: function getBm25EngineStatus(database: Database.Database | null | undefined = null): {
1497:   lexical_engine: Bm25Engine;
1498:   fts5_available: boolean;
1499:   warms_in_memory_bm25: boolean;
1500:   bm25_enabled: boolean;
1501: } {
1502:   const lexical_engine = resolveBm25Engine();
1503:   const fts5_available = isMemoryFtsAvailable(database);
1504:   let warms_in_memory_bm25 = false;
1505: 
1506:   try {
1507:     warms_in_memory_bm25 = shouldWarmInMemoryBm25(database);
1508:   } catch {
1509:     warms_in_memory_bm25 = false;
1510:   }
1511: 
1512:   return {
1513:     lexical_engine,
1514:     fts5_available,
1515:     warms_in_memory_bm25,
1516:     bm25_enabled: isBm25Enabled(),
1517:   };
1518: }
1519: 
1520: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1521: // 6. EXPORTS
1522: 
1523: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1524: export {
1525:   BM25Index,
1526:   getIndex,
1527:   resetIndex,
1528:   tokenize,
1529:   simpleStem,
1530:   getTermFrequencies,
1531:   isBm25Enabled,
1532:   resolveBm25Engine,
1533:   isMemoryFtsAvailable,
1534:   shouldWarmInMemoryBm25,
1535:   shouldUseSqliteLexicalEngine,
1536:   getBm25EngineStatus,
1537:   sanitizeQueryTokens,
1538:   sanitizeFTS5Query,
1539:   normalizeLexicalQueryTokens,
1540:   buildBm25DocumentText,
1541:   buildBm25DocumentFields,
1542:   DEFAULT_K1,
1543:   DEFAULT_B,
1544:   BM25_FTS5_WEIGHTS,
1545:   BM25_FIELD_WEIGHTS,
1546: };
1547: 
1548: export type {
1549:   BM25SearchResult,
1550:   BM25Stats,

1552:   BM25DocumentFields,
1553:   BM25FieldWeights,

1558: };
